course.title: Koyi Yin Nazari

body.bq1: Waɗannan kuwa sun fi waɗanda suke a Tasalonika daraja, gama sun karɓi maganar da sha'awa mai zafi, suna bincika Nassosi da kyau kowace rana don su ga ko abubuwan haka suke.
body.h3_1: Alamomi uku na nazarin da yake tsara rayuwa

list1.item1: Akai-akai. Tsari ya fi ƙarfi. Mintuna goma sha biyar kowace rana ya fi sa'o'i uku a ranar Asabar.
list1.item2: Mai motsa rai. Da fensir a hannu. Da tambaya a zuciya. Idan ba za ka iya tunawa da abin da ka karanta bayan sa'a guda ba, ba ka yi nazari ne na gaske ba.
list1.item3: Tare da addu'a. Jehobah yana ba da hikima cikin yalwa ga waɗanda suka roƙa (Yaƙ. 1:5). Ruhu mai tsarki ba ya zuwa ba tare da rokon ba, ka roƙa.

body.p1: Sa'ad da Bulus yake wa'azi a Beriya, mutanen wurin sun yi wani abu da manzon ya yaba musu da shi. Sun karɓi maganar da sha'awa, amma ba su tsaya nan ba. Sun bincika.
body.p2: Wannan ne tsarin nazarin kai-da-kai. Karɓa da sha'awa da kuma bincike a hankali, kowace rana. Ba ya isa kawai a yarda da abin da ake ji a tarurruka. Mutanen Beriya, da kuma Bulus kansa, wanda ya rubuta yawancin Nassosin Helenanci na Kirista fiye da kowa, suna so mu yi bincike da kanmu.
body.p3: An gina wannan kwas a kan waɗannan alamomi uku. Za ka yi gajerun atisaye da nassosi na gaske, ba kawai karatu game da su ba. Wannan ƙaramin tsarin Beriya ne.

ex.prompt1: Mene ne ka karanta a Littafi Mai Tsarki ko littattafai a wannan makon da ya wuce?
ex.prompt2: Inda ka ga halayen Jehobah a cikin nassin?
ex.prompt3: Mene ne wannan nassin yake roƙonka ka canja, ko ka fara, ko ka daina?
ex.prompt4: Rubuta addu'a ta jumla ɗaya da ke mai da amsar da ke sama zuwa hira da Jehobah.
ex.title: Yi tunani: me ya motsa ka a wannan makon?

lesson1.oneLine: Mutanen Beriya ba kawai sun saurara ba. Sun bincika. Mu ma haka ya kamata.
lesson1.title: Me Ya Sa Nazarin Kai-da-Kai Yake da Muhimmanci

body.bq1: Ƙa'idar gaba ɗaya: JW Library don karatu da tarurruka. WOL don bincike da amsa tambayoyi.
body.h3_1: JW Library: aboki mai aminci na fage
body.p1: Mun samu sauƙi. Ɗaliban Littafi Mai Tsarki kafin mu sun haɗa lokacin nazarin su daga Littattafai Masu Tsarki na takarda, da rubutattun ƙasidu, da tafiye-tafiye zuwa ɗakin karatu na Majami'ar Mulki. A yau, manhajoji biyu sun yi yawancin wannan aikin, kuma sanin wadda za a yi amfani da ita yana ceton lokaci na gaske.
body.p2: JW Library shi ne Sabuwar Duniya Fassarar, kafofin watsa labarai na tarurruka, littafin waƙoƙi, da rubutu na yau a aljihunka. Yana iya ɗauka, yana aiki ba tare da intanet ba, kuma an tsara shi don karatu da tarurruka, ba don zurfin bincike ba.
body.p3: WOL shi ne dukan ɗakin. Kowane littafi, an lissafa shi kuma an haɗa shi. Wannan ne inda za ka je sa'ad da tambaya ta tashi kuma kana bukatar bin ta, ta tsofaffin makalun Hasumiyar Tsaro, da ƙididdigar Insight, da surori na Reasoning, da Yearbooks.

ex.intro: Kowane yanayi yana faruwa a rayuwa ta gaske. Wace dabara ce ta fi dacewa?

q1.explanation: An gina JW Library don karatu ba tare da intanet ba, da hannu ɗaya. Rubutu na yau yana zaune a babban allon kuma Littafi Mai Tsarki yana taɓo guda kawai.
q1.scenario: Kana cikin bas kuma kana son karanta rubutu na yau da bita babi na Littafi Mai Tsarki na yau da sauri.

q2.explanation: WOL shi ne ɗakin karatu na bincike. Yi amfani da binciken sa da alamun zance kewaye da "Hezekiyah" don samun jerin sunaye masu daraja a duk littattafai.
q2.scenario: Kana son samun kowane labari na Hasumiyar Tsaro da yake tattauna sauye-sauyen Sarki Hezekiyah a cikin shekaru ashirin da suka wuce.

q3.explanation: NWT Study Edition a JW Library yana nuna rubutun nazari da nassosi masu alaƙa kai tsaye kusa da ayar. WOL yana da su ma, amma ra'ayin Littafi Mai Tsarki na JW Library yana da sauri ga nassi guda.
q3.scenario: Kana shirya jawabi kuma kana son nassosi masu alaƙa na Reference Bible kusa da ayar da kake aiki da ita.

q4.explanation: JW Library yana ajiye kafofin watsa labarai na tarurruka don amfani ba tare da intanet ba bayan ka sauke su. WOL yana bukatar haɗin intanet.
q4.scenario: Kana son sake duba bidiyon taron makon da ya wuce sa'ad da kake gida da dangi babu Wi-Fi.

q5.explanation: Insight yana cikin biyu, amma ƙwarewar haɗin alaƙa ta WOL ta fi sauri ga dogayen ƙididdiga irin na encyclopedia inda za ka tsallake tsakanin ƙananan ƙididdiga.
q5.scenario: Kana son karanta cikakken ƙididdigar Insight on the Scriptures kan "Bangaskiya" tare da dukan sassansa da haɗin alaƙarsa.

ex.title: Nassi mai alaƙa: zaɓi kayan aikin da ya dace

lesson2.oneLine: Kayan aiki biyu masu kyau. Ayyuka daban-daban. Sanin wanda za a yi amfani da shi shi ne rabin yaƙin.
lesson2.title: JW Library da Watchtower ONLINE LIBRARY

body.p1: Sabbin ɗaliban Littafi Mai Tsarki wani lokaci suna tunanin duk littattafan suna faɗar abu ɗaya. Ba haka ba ne. An rubuta kowannensu ga aiki dabam. Ga biyar da za ka yi amfani da su sosai.
body.p2: Encyclopedia. Mujalladai biyu da suke kunshe da mutane, wurare, abubuwa, ra'ayoyi, bisa tsarin haruffa, tare da nassosi masu alaƙa. Sa'ad da suna, kalma, ko al'ada a Nassosi suka tsayar da kai, Insight ne wuri na farko.
body.p3: Aboki na hidimar fage. An tsara shi bisa jigogi, "Jini," "Gicciye," "Allah," "Wahala," tare da amsoshi kai tsaye da samfurin layukan tattaunawa. An gina shi don adawa da tattaunawa.
body.p4: Abinci na ruhaniya na yanzu. Bugun Nazari shi ne kayan tarurruka; an rubuta Bugun Jama'a ga masu sauraro mafi yawa. Sa'ad da tambaya tana game da fahimtarmu ta yanzu, sabuwar Hasumiyar Tsaro kusan koyaushe ita ce inda za a duba.
body.p5: Ƙa'idodin Littafi Mai Tsarki da aka yi amfani da su a rayuwar yau da kullum, iyali, aiki, lafiya, damuwa, matasa. Muryarsa tana da daɗi kuma mai amfani. Mai kyau ga mai gida da bai shirya don zurfin tattaunawa ba tukuna.
body.p6: Ɗaya daga cikin iyalin littattafan annabci (tare da Irmiya, Annabcin Ishaya, da Ƙarshen Daukaka na Wahayin Yohanna) da suke tafiya aya-aya ta cikin Ezekiyel. Yi amfani da waɗannan sa'ad da kake nazarin littafin annabci.

ex.intro: Aboki ko mai gida ya tambaye ka ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan. Wane littafi ne mafi kyau a fara da shi?

q1.explanation: Reasoning yana da cikakken babi a kan "Wahala" da nassosi, da hujja mai ma'ana, da samfurin amsoshin tattaunawa, an gina shi daidai don wannan tambaya.
q1.scenario: "Me ya sa Allah mai ƙauna yake yarda da wahala a duniya?"

q2.explanation: Insight shi ne encyclopedia, ƙididdigar "Jehobah" tana kunshe da asalin kalma, tarihin furcin, da kowane nassi tare da zurfi.
q2.scenario: "Mene ne sunan Jehobah ya kasance yana nufi a tsohon Ibrananci, kuma yaya ake furtawa?"

q3.explanation: Awake! ya ƙware kan jigogi masu amfani na rayuwa kamar damuwa, tare da ƙa'idodin Littafi Mai Tsarki da aka gabatar cikin ladabi. Sabuwar makalar nazarin Hasumiyar Tsaro za ta kasance mai kyau ma.
q3.scenario: "Ina ci gaba da kwance a dare cike da damuwa. Mene ne Littafi Mai Tsarki ya ce in yi?"

q4.explanation: Fara da ƙididdigar Insight kan "Babban Taro" don cikakken bayanin nassi. Sharhi na annabci kan Wahayin Yohanna sun fi zurfi, kuma Reasoning yana ba da gajeren bayanin tattaunawa.
q4.scenario: "Mene ne 'babban taro' da aka ambata a Wahayin Yohanna 7, kuma ta yaya muka san cewa ƙungiya dabam ce daga 144,000?"

q5.explanation: Game da tambayoyin da fahimtarmu ta sami gyaran lokaci-lokaci, sabuwar makalar Hasumiyar Tsaro tana ɗauke da abinci na ruhaniya na yanzu. Koyaushe duba sabon.
q5.scenario: "Ina son fahimtar shiriyar Littafi Mai Tsarki ta yanzu kan ɓangarorin jini don amfanin likita."

ex.title: Nassi mai alaƙa: wane littafi ne ya dace da wannan tambaya?

lesson3.oneLine: Bawan mai aminci da hankali ya ba mu cikakken ɗaki. Kowane littafi yana yin aiki ɗaya da kyau ƙwarai.
lesson3.title: Insight, Reasoning & Sauran Littattafai

unit1.oneLine: Kafin ka koyi yin nazari da zurfi, kana bukatar ka san abin da ke hannunka da kuma me ya sa yake nan.
unit1.title: Kayan Aikinka na Nazari

body.p1: S.O.A.P. taƙaitaccen suna ne, Scripture, Observation, Application, Prayer, kuma yana ɗaya daga cikin tsare-tsaren da ya fi sauƙi kuma ya ƙarfafa wajen mai da karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki ya zama nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki. Yana aiki ga aya ɗaya ko cikakken babi.
body.p2: Rubuta ayar. Da hannu idan za ka iya. Kwafin yana tilasta maka ka rage saurinka kuma ka lura da abubuwan da mai karatu mai sauri zai rasa: ƙarin haɗakai, umarni, sharuɗɗa.
body.p3: Mene ne nassin yake faɗa da gaske? Wa yake magana? Ga wa? Yaushe? Wace kalma ce take maimaitawa? Wannan ba game da kai ba ne tukuna, game da abin da yake a kan shafin ne.
body.p4: Yanzu juyo ga kanka. Mene ne wannan ayar take roƙona a yau? Ina nake rayuwa cin amana? Yaya biyayya za ta yi kama da ita a wannan makon?
body.p5: Yi addu'a ga Jehobah da ayar. Gode masa don abin da yake bayyana game da shi. Roƙa taimako na musamman da yin amfani yake bukata.

ex.promptA: A ina a rayuwarka a yanzu kake 'dogara ga fahimtarka kanka'? Yaya dogara ga Jehobah za ta yi kama a wurin a wannan makon?
ex.promptO: Mene ne wannan nassin yake umarci? Mene ne yake yin alkawari? Mene ne sharaɗin?
ex.promptP: Mai da amsarka ta zama ɗan gajeren addu'a. Fara da 'Jehobah,' kuma ka kasance da gaskiya.
ex.promptS: Kwafa Misalai 3:5-6 da rubutunka, ko ka rubuta a hankali a ƙasa.
ex.title: S.O.A.P. kan Misalai 3:5-6
ex.verseText: Ka dogara ga Jehobah da dukan zuciyarka, kada ka jingina ga fahimtarka kanka. A dukan hanyoyinka ka tuna shi, shi kuwa zai miƙe hanyoyinka.

lesson4.oneLine: Haruffa huɗu. Ɗaya daga cikin tsare-tsaren da suka fi aminci ga zaman zurfin nazarin kai-da-kai.
lesson4.title: Hanyar S.O.A.P.

list1.item1: Wa, wa yake magana, kuma ga wa suke magana?
list1.item2: Mene, mene ne yake faruwa a ayar da gaske? Wace kalma ce ake maimaitawa ko ake jaddadawa?
list1.item3: Yaushe / Ina, mene ne tarihin ko yanayin ƙasa?
list1.item4: Me ya sa, me ya sa Jehobah zai so a rubuta wannan? Me ya sa yana da muhimmanci?
list1.item5: Yaya, yaya yake amfani gare ni, a yau, a cikin yanayina na gaske?

body.p1: Aya na iya yin kama da fanko a kan karatu mai sauri. Ayar guda, idan aka sa ta a ƙarƙashin tambayoyi masu daidai, tana buɗewa. Ga tambayoyi biyar da kusan koyaushe suke gano sabon abu.
body.p2: Ka sa kowace aya ta wuce ta dukan tambayoyi biyar kuma ka yi tunani fiye da yadda mafi yawan mutane suke yi a cikin cikakken babi na karatu.

how.hint: Ambato damuwa ɗaya ta musamman da za ka 'jefa' a kan Jehobah a addu'a a yau.
how.prompt: Yaya wannan yake amfani gare ka a wannan makon?

ex.title: Yi amfani da tambayoyi biyar a kan 1 Bitrus 5:7
ex.verseText: Ku jefa dukan damuwarku a kansa, gama yana kula da ku.

what.hint: 'Jefa,' ya kasance mai ƙarfi, ba mai jinkiri ba. 'Dukan' ita ce kalmar da aka jaddada.
what.prompt: Mene ne umarni, kuma wace kalma ce ake jaddadawa?

whenWhere.hint: An rubuta a kusa da 62–64 K.A., ga 'yan'uwa maza da mata da suke fuskantar ƙaruwar adawar Roma.

who.hint: Bitrus, dattijon abokin aiki, yana rubutawa Kiristoci da suka warwatse a Asiya Ƙarama.
who.prompt: Wa yake magana, kuma ga wa yake rubutawa?

why.hint: Saboda damuwa tana raba mu, kuma wannan ayar ita ce gyaran, muna da Uba mai kula.
why.prompt: Me ya sa Jehobah zai so a rubuta wannan?

lesson5.oneLine: Tambayoyi masu kyau su ne maɓallai da suke buɗe rufaffiyar ayoyi.
lesson5.title: Yin Tambayoyin da Suke Buɗe Ayoyi

list1.item5: Shunayya, nassi mai alaƙa da ya cancanci a bi.

body.p1: Yin alama ba tare da tsari ba kawai ado ne. Ga tsari mai sauƙi na launuka biyar da ya tsira na shekarun da yawa na ɗaliban Littafi Mai Tsarki, kuma yana aiki sosai a JW Library kamar yadda yake a Littafi Mai Tsarki na takarda.
body.p2: Lokaci na gaba da za ka zauna da sakin layin Hasumiyar Tsaro, ka rage sauri kuma ka yi masa alama. Sakin layi guda da ka yi alama da ka tuna ya fi surori goma da ka karanta da sauri ba tare da tunawa ba.

guide.command: "yana umartar mu mu yi addu'a ba tare da fasawa ba," umarni
guide.promise: "yana yin alkawari ya kiyaye mu," alkawari
guide.warning: "barewa tana kai ga lalacewar bangaskiya," gargaɗi

ex.passageSource: Sakin layi na samfuri don atisaye
ex.title: Yi alama a sakin layi irin na Hasumiyar Tsaro

lesson6.oneLine: Alamomi a kan shafin abubuwan tunawa ne. Tsari mai kyau yana mai da sakin layi ya zama taswira.
lesson6.title: Yin Alama da Rubuta Bayanai da Yake Aiki

unit2.oneLine: Yanzu kana da kayan aiki. Ga yadda za ka yi amfani da su.
unit2.title: Fasahar Yin Nazari

body.h3_1: Wurare uku don samun nassosi masu alaƙa

list1.item1: Nassosi a gefen NWT Reference Bible, ginshiƙin dama, ga kowace muhimmin aya.
list1.item2: Fasalin cited-by na WOL, yana nuna kowane littafi da yake faɗin ayar da kake kanta.
list1.item3: Insight on the Scriptures, ƙididdigar jigogi suna haɗawa da dukan manyan nassosi a kan jigon.

body.p1: Jehobah ya rubuta Maganarsa ta hanyar da take magana da kanta. Aya a Farawa tana haɗuwa da ɗaya a Wahayin Yohanna. Jumla a Zabura tana haska labari a Sarakuna. Bin nassosi masu alaƙa ƙwarewa ce ta bin waɗannan haɗakai, kuma an tsara NWT Reference Edition don haka.
body.p2: Gina sarƙa. Fara da aya. Bi nassi guda. Sa'an nan ka bi guda daga can. Bayan tsalle uku ko huɗu, za ka ga tsari da ba za ka taɓa gani a farkon ayar kawai ba.

how.hint: Ka yi takamaiman, lokaci na musamman, babi na musamman, addu'a ta musamman.
how.prompt: Mene ne abu ɗaya da za ka yi a wannan makon don ka 'ci gaba da sanin' Jehobah?

ex.title: Gina sarƙa daga Yohanna 17:3
ex.verseText: Wannan na nufin rai na har abada, sanin ka, kai ne kaɗai Allah na gaskiya, da wanda ka aiko, Yesu Kristi.

what.hint: 2 Bitrus 3:18, 'ku ci gaba da girma a cikin alherin da bai cancanta ba da kuma sanin Ubangijinmu.'
what.prompt: Mene ne 'sanin' yake nufi? Nemi aya da ke kwatanta sanin Allah a matsayin abu mai ci gaba, ba abu ne na lokaci ɗaya ba.

whenWhere.hint: 1 Korintiyawa 8:6, 'a wajenmu Allah ɗaya kawai akwai, Uba... kuma Ubangiji ɗaya, Yesu Kristi.'
whenWhere.prompt: Ayar tana bambanta 'kai ne kaɗai Allah na gaskiya' daga Yesu. Nemi wata aya da take yin bambanci iri ɗaya.

who.hint: Matiyu 26:39 yana ɗaya daga cikin masu zafi sosai, kwatanta yanayinsa ga Uban.
who.prompt: Wa yake magana a nan? Nemi nassi mai alaƙa zuwa wata addu'a ta Yesu kuma ka rubuta ayar.

why.hint: Yaƙub 4:8, 'ku zo kusa ga Allah, shi kuma zai zo kusa gare ku.'
why.prompt: Me ya sa Yesu yake gabatar da 'rai na har abada' a matsayin alaƙa maimakon lada? Nemi aya da ke nuna zuciyar Jehobah gare mu.

lesson7.oneLine: Nassi shi ne sharhinsa mafi kyau. Koyon haɗa nassosi koyo ne na yin tunani kamar ɗan Beriya.
lesson7.title: Bin Nassosi Masu Alaƙa Kamar Ɗan Beriya

body.bq1: Sha'awarsa tana cikin shari'ar Jehobah, kuma yana karanta shari'arsa da ƙaramar murya dare da rana.
body.h3_1: Yadda yin tunani ya bambanta da karatu
body.h3_2: Tsari mai sauƙi na minti uku

list1.item1: Zaɓi aya ɗaya. Ɗaya kawai. Kada ka gaggauta zuwa ta gaba.
list1.item2: Karanta ta sau uku, a hankali. Tsaya bayan kowane karatu.
list1.item3: Zauna da ita. Bari tambaya ta tashi. Bari ji ya tashi. Bari Jehobah ya yi magana.

body.p1: Kalmar Ibrananci da aka fassara 'yana karantawa da ƙaramar murya' tana ɗauke da kwatancin saniya tana taunar abinci, a hankali, akai-akai, da haƙuri. Yin tunani shi ne wannan tauna a hankali. Ba za ka samu abinci mai gina jiki daga aya da ka haɗiye gaba ɗaya ba.
body.p2: Karatu yana tambaya, "Mene ne ta ke faɗa?" Yin tunani yana tambaya, "Mene ne tana nufi, kuma mene ne tana yi mini?" Ɗaya tana cika hankali. Ɗaya tana tsara mutum.

introVerse.text: Jehobah Makiyayina ne. Ba zan rasa kome ba.

ex.prompt1: Karanta ayar sau uku a hankali. Bari karatu na biyu ya zama mai jinkiri fiye da na farko.
ex.prompt2: Wace kwatanta kalmar 'Makiyayi' take tashi gare ka? Mene ne tana faɗa maka game da yadda Jehobah yake da alaƙa da kai?
ex.prompt3: A ina a rayuwarka a yanzu kake jin tsoron za ka rasa wani abu? Riƙe wannan tare da ayar.
ex.prompt4: Rubuta jumla ɗaya ga Jehobah game da abin da ka gani.
ex.title: Yin tunani na minti 3 da jagoranci

lesson8.oneLine: Karatu shi ne abinci. Yin tunani shi ne tauna. Yawancin abinci mai gina jiki yana faruwa a nan.
lesson8.title: Yin Tunani, Bari Maganar Ta Shiga

list1.item1: Kullum (min 15): Karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki + rubutu na yau. Lokaci ɗaya, wuri ɗaya.
list1.item2: Tsakiyar mako (min 45): Shirye-shiryen taro, karanta makalar nazarin Hasumiyar Tsaro, yi alama, yi nuni.
list1.item3: Karshen mako (min 60): Nazari na S.O.A.P. ɗaya kan babi da ka zaɓa.
list1.item4: Kowane wata: Zaɓi ƙididdigar Insight ɗaya don karantawa har ƙarshe.

body.p1: Mun rufe kayan aiki da fasaha. Yanzu ga ɓangaren da ya fi wuya: ci gaba da yin shi. Halaye, ba jaruntaka ba, sun gina ɗalibin Littafi Mai Tsarki.
body.p2: Wannan ba tsari ba ne. Tsari ne. Rage shi ko fadada shi don dacewa da rayuwarka, amma rubuta abin da ka yi alkawari, sa'an nan ka ci gaba da bayyana.
body.p3: Daukaka duka ga Jehobah. Ya ba mu Maganarsa, ruhunsa, da ƙungiyarsa. Sauran kawai shi ne mu bayyana.

ex.prompt1: A wane lokaci na rana za ka yi nazari? (Ka yi takamaiman, alal misali '7:00 na safe, kafin karin kumallo.')
ex.prompt2: Wane kwana na mako? (Fara da ƙanƙane fiye da yadda kake tsammani, kwanaki uku da kake yin gaske ya fi bakwai da ba ka yi ba.)
ex.prompt3: Ina za ka yi nazari? (Wuri ɗaya kowane lokaci, idan zai yiwu.)
ex.prompt4: Wane littafi na Littafi Mai Tsarki za ka fara da shi? (Idan ba ka tabbata ba, Markus gajere ne. Yaƙub mai amfani ne. Zabura mai arziki ce.)
ex.prompt5: Rubuta jumla ɗaya na alkawari ga Jehobah. Ba kana yin alkawari kamala ba, kana yin alkawari za ka bayyana.
ex.title: Alkawarinka

lesson9.oneLine: Hanyar nazari mafi kyau ita ce wadda za ka kasance kana yin ta a shekara mai zuwa.
lesson9.title: Gina Tsarinka na Nazari

unit3.oneLine: Daga fasaha zuwa kafa, nazari a matsayin halayen rayuwa.
unit3.title: Zurfafa

notFound.body: Adireshin da ka shigar ba ya wanzu. Watakila an ƙaura, an share, ko kuma ka rubuta shi kuskure.
notFound.bodyShort: Shafin da kake nema ba ya wanzu ko kuma an ƙaura.
notFound.title: Ba a samu shafin ba
notFound.verse: "Maganarka fitila ce ga ƙafafuna, haske kuma a kan hanyata.", Zabura 119:105

privacy.lastUpdated: An sabunta na ƙarshe: 18 ga Afrilu, 2026

meta.description: Karanta manufar sirri ta JW Study, yadda muke tattara, amfani, da kare bayananka na sirri.
meta.title: Manufar Sirri | JW Study

section1.body1: JW Study ("mu", "namu") ya himmatu wajen kare sirrinka. Wannan Manufar Sirri ta bayyana irin bayanan da muke tattarawa, yadda muke amfani da su, da hakkokinka game da waɗannan bayanai sa'ad da kake amfani da Manhajarmu a jwstudy.org.
section1.body2: JW Study sabis ne kyauta. Ba mu sayar da bayananka, ba ma samun kuɗi daga bayananka, ba kuma ma amfani da su don tallace-tallace na kowane iri.
section1.heading: 1. Bayyani

section10.body: Mu na iya bayyana bayananka ga jami'an tsaro, hukumomin gwamnati, ko wasu masu izini sa'ad da doka, umarnin kotu, ko kuma idan muka yi imani da gaskiya cewa bayyanawa ya zama dole don hana cutarwa, kare aminci na kowa, ko amsa gaggawa.
section10.heading: 10. Buƙatun Jami'an Tsaro

section11.body: Mu na iya sabunta wannan Manufar Sirri lokaci-lokaci. Za mu sabunta kwanan watan "An sabunta na ƙarshe" a saman wannan shafin. Ci gaba da amfani da Manhaja bayan an buga canje-canjen yana nufin kun yarda da sabuwar manufa.
section11.heading: 11. Canje-canje ga Wannan Manufa

section12.body: Idan kana da tambayoyi ko damuwa game da wannan Manufar Sirri, ka tuntube mu ta tarukan al'umma ko ta jwstudy.org.
section12.heading: 12. Tuntuɓa

section2.heading: 2. Bayanan da Muke Tattarawa
section2.item1Body: Sa'ad da ka yi rajista, muna tattara adireshin imel ɗinka da kuma kowane suna na nuni ko hoton bayanin da ka samar.
section2.item2Body: Muna ajiye babukan Littafi Mai Tsarki da ka alama a matsayin karanta domin ci gabanka ya hadu a kan kowane na'urori.
section2.item3Body: Saƙonnin shafi, tarukan dandalin, amsoshi, sharhi, rubutu, da bayanan bayanin da ka kirkira ana adana su kuma ana danganta su da asusunka.
section2.item4Body: Saƙonnin da kake aikawa zuwa Abokin Nazari na AI ana isar da su zuwa mai samar da AI namu (Anthropic) don samar da amsa kuma ba a adana su har abada a sabarun mu. Muna yin rikodin ƙididdiga na amfani (yawan buƙatun AI a kowane mai amfani) don hana cin zarafi da inganta sabis. Ba a adana abun cikin tattaunawar AI ko a raba shi a fili.
section2.item5Body: Ana iya bincika abun cikin da aka mika don kalmomin ƙazanta da hanyoyi zuwa tushen ridda ko tsohuwar JW da suka saba da koyarwar Shaidun Jehobah (ana toshe waɗannan hanyoyi kuma ba a ajiye su). Kai ne ke da alhakin kowane bayani na sirri (imel, lambar waya, hanyoyin sada zumunta, da sauransu) da ka zaɓi raba a saƙonninka, saƙonni, ko bayanin, kar ka raba bayanan da ba za ka so wasu membobin al'umma su gani ba.
section2.item6Body: Idan ka kunna sanarwar tura, muna ajiye alamar sanarwar na'ura don kawo gargadi zuwa na'urarka. Kana iya soke wannan a kowane lokaci ta saitunan browser ko na'urarka.
section2.item7Body: Muna amfani da Google Analytics (GA4) da Vercel Analytics don tattara bayanan da ba a san su ba game da yadda ake amfani da Manhaja (shafukan da aka ziyarta, tsawon zaman, nau'in na'ura, wuri na gaba ɗaya ta ƙasa). Babu wani bayani na sirri da za a iya gane shi ake aikawa zuwa waɗannan sabis ɗin nazari.
section2.item8Body: Muna amfani da Sentry don ɗaukar kuskuren manhaja da matsalolin aiki. Rahotannin kuskure suna iya haɗawa da nau'in browser, OS, da bin diddigin kuskuren, amma ba sa haɗa abun cikin saƙonninka ko saƙonninka.
section2.item9Body: Ana iya tattara rajistocin ayyukan sabar na yau da kullun da suka haɗa da adireshin IP da nau'in browser ta mai samar da masaukin (Vercel) da mai samar da bayanan (Supabase).

section3.footer3: amfani da bayananka don tallace-tallace. Ba mu
section3.footer4: raba bayananka da kowane ɓangare na uku sai dai kamar yadda aka bayyana a Sashe na 4.
section3.heading: 3. Yadda Muke Amfani da Bayananka
section3.item1: Don samar da kuma kula da Manhaja da asusunka
section3.item2: Don haɗa ci gaban karatunka a kan na'urori daban-daban
section3.item3: Don aika imel na ma'amala (tabbatarwar imel, sake saita kalmar shiga)
section3.item4: Don kawo sanarwar tura da ka yarda da ita
section3.item5: Don nuna bayaninka na jama'a da abun ciki ga sauran masu amfani
section3.item6: Don kunna Abokin Nazari na AI ta wajen aika saƙonninka zuwa mai samar da AI namu
section3.item7: Don inganta Manhaja ta amfani da bayanan da ba a san su ba da sa ido kan kuskure
section3.item8: Don hana cin zarafi da aiwatar da ƙa'idodin al'ummarmu
section3.item9: Don bincika keta dokoki da haɗin gwiwa da jami'an tsaro inda doka ta buƙata

section4.heading: 4. Sabis ɗin Bangare na Uku
section4.intro: Muna amfani da sabis ɗin bangare na uku masu zuwa don gudanar da Manhaja. Kowannensu yana da nasa manufar sirri da ke jagorantar yadda yake gudanar da bayanai:
section4.item2Body: , masauki, turawa, da ayyuka na gefe (vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy)
section4.item3Body: , samfurin yare na AI da ke kunna Abokin Nazari na AI (anthropic.com/privacy)
section4.item5Body: , nazarin amfani da ba a san shi ba; ba a raba bayanai na sirri (policies.google.com/privacy)
section4.item6Body: , nazarin amfani da ba a san shi ba, ba tare da kuki ba
section4.item7Body: , sa ido kan kuskuren manhaja da aiki (sentry.io/privacy)

section5.body1: Abokin Nazari na AI yana aika saƙonninka zuwa API ɗin Anthropic don samar da amsoshi. Ayyukan tafiyar da bayanan Anthropic suna ƙarƙashin manufar sirrinsu. Ba ma adana abun cikin tattaunawar AI ɗinka har abada a sabarun mu. Muna ajiye ƙididdiga na amfani kawai a kowane mai amfani don dalilan hana cin zarafi.
section5.body2: Tsare-tsaren shafin da AI ya samar da ka zaɓa wallafa sun zama abun cikin mai amfani da ke ƙarƙashin sharuɗɗa iri ɗaya kamar kowane abun cikin da ka samar.
section5.body3Rest: Ka ɗauki Abokin Nazari na AI kamar yadda za ka yi da kowace sabis na cloud.
section5.body3Strong: Kar ka raba bayanan sirri masu mahimmanci a tattaunawar AI.
section5.heading: 5. Tafiyar da Bayanan AI

section6.body: Ana riƙe bayananka muddin asusunka yana aiki. Idan ka share asusunka, za a cire bayananka na sirri da abun cikinka daga tsarin mu cikin lokaci mai ma'ana, sai dai inda doka ta buƙata adana, gami da bayanan da doka ta buƙace mu adana dangane da rahotannin da aka aika ga jami'an tsaro ko hukumomin amincin yara.
section6.heading: 6. Riƙe Bayanai

section7.footer: Don aiwatar da kowane daga cikin waɗannan hakkoki, ka tuntube mu ta dandalin Manhajar ko ta jwstudy.org.
section7.heading: 7. Hakkokinka
section7.intro: Dangane da wurin da kake, kana iya samun damar:
section7.item1: Samun damar bayanan sirri da muke da su game da kai
section7.item2: Gyara bayanan da ba daidai ba ta saitin bayanin
section7.item3: Buƙatar a share asusunka da bayananka
section7.item5: Cire kanka daga sanarwar tura a kowane lokaci ta saitunan browser ko na'urarka

section8.body: Manhajar tana amfani da localStorage na browser don adana zaɓin jigon ka, cache na ci gaban karatu, da tarihin tattaunawar AI don ƙwarewa mai kyau. Vercel Analytics na tattara bayanan amfani da ba a san su ba, ba tare da kuki ba. Google Analytics na amfani da kuki don auna amfani, kana iya cire kanka ta saitunan browser ko ƙarin browser na cire Google Analytics.
section8.heading: 8. Kuki & Ajiyar Cikin Gida

section9.ageBody: Wannan Manhaja an yi ta ne ga masu amfani waɗanda shekarunsu suka kai 13 ko sama. Masu amfani tsakanin shekaru 13 da 17 dole ne su sami izini daga iyaye ko mai kula. Ba mu sane mu tattara bayanan sirri daga yara ƙasa da shekaru 13 ba. Idan ka yi imanin yaro ƙasa da shekaru 13 ya kirkiri asusu, da fatan a tuntube mu nan da nan don mu cire shi.
section9.commitmentBody: Muna ɗaukar amincin yara akan dandalinmu da matuƙar muhimmanci. Muna sa ido sosai kuma muna haramta duk wani abun ciki ko hali da zai iya cutarwa, cin zarafi, ko jima'i ga ƙananan yara. Wannan ya haɗa da Kayan Cin Zarafin Yara (CSAM), grooming, ko duk wani yunƙuri na neman bayanan sirri daga ƙananan yara.
section9.dataNote: Sa'ad da muke yin irin waɗannan rahotanni, muna ba da duk bayanan da suka dace gami da bayanan asusu, adireshin IP, lokuta, da abun ciki. Wannan rabon bayanan doka ta buƙata kuma ba ya ƙarƙashin kariyar sirri da aka bayyana a wani wuri a wannan manufa.
section9.heading: 🛡️ 9. Sirrin Yara & Amincin Yara
section9.item1Body: (CyberTipLine.org), kamar yadda dokar tarayya ta Amurka ta buƙata (18 U.S.C. § 2258A)
section9.item2Body: a yankin da keta ya faru
section9.parentalBody: Muna ƙarfafa iyaye da masu kula su sake duba amfanin yaransu da wannan Manhaja. Idan kana da damuwa game da abun ciki ko hulɗa da yaronka ya gamu da shi a JW Study, da fatan a yi rahoto ta amfani da fasalin rahoto na cikin manhaja ko ka tuntube mu kai tsaye.
section9.reportingBody: Doka ta tilasta mana, kuma a ɗabi'a mun himmatu, mu yi rahoto game da kowane abu na cin zarafin yara ko ayyukan grooming da aka gano akan dandalinmu ga hukumomi masu dacewa, ciki har da:

meta.description: Sake duba sharuɗɗan sabis na JW Study da ke jagorantar amfani da mai bin diddigin karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki da abubuwan al'umma.
meta.title: Sharuɗɗan Sabis | JW Study

section1.body: Ta hanyar shiga ko amfani da JW Study ("Manhajar") a jwstudy.org, kun yarda da kasancewa cikin waɗannan Sharuɗɗan Sabis. Idan ba ku yarda ba, da fatan kar ku yi amfani da Manhajar.
section1.heading: 1. Yarda da Sharuɗɗa

section10.body: Sunan JW Study, tambari, ƙira, da ainihin lambar sune mallakar Lexx Solutionz. Maganar nassi sun fito ne daga Sabuwar Duniya Fassara ta Nassosi Mai Tsarki kuma ana amfani da su don nazari na sirri da na al'umma. Duk littattafan Watch Tower da aka ambata a cikin Manhajar sun kasance mallakar Watch Tower Bible and Tract Society of Pennsylvania.
section10.heading: 10. Mallakar Hankali

section11.body: JW Study kayan aikin nazari ne na 'yancin kai da Shaidun Jehobah suka kirkira kuma don su. Ba ya da haɗin kai da, ko Watch Tower Bible and Tract Society of Pennsylvania, Hukumar Jagora ta Shaidun Jehobah, ko kowane ƙungiyar JW ta hukuma. Duk koyarwa an yi niyya su zama daidai da koyarwar JW na hukuma, amma masu amfani su dogara ga kayayyakin jw.org na hukuma don jagoranci na hukuma.
section11.heading: 11. Babu Haɗin Kai da Watch Tower

section12.body: Ana ba da Manhajar "yadda take" ba tare da kowane irin garantin ba. Ba mu tabbatar da cewa Manhajar za ta kasance ba tare da kuskure ba, ba tare da hutawa ba, ko kuma ba za a taɓa rasa bayanai ba. Ku yi amfani da Manhajar ta hadarin ku.
section12.heading: 12. Ƙin yarda da Garanti

section13.body: Zuwa iya iyaka da doka ta yarda, JW Study da Lexx Solutionz ba za su ɗauki alhakin kowane irin lalacewa kai tsaye, ba zato ba tsammani, ko sakamako ba da ya tashi daga amfani da Manhajar.
section13.heading: 13. Iyakar Alhaki

section14.body: Mu na iya sabunta waɗannan Sharuɗɗan a kowane lokaci. Ci gaba da amfani da Manhajar bayan an buga canje-canjen yana nufin yarda da sabbin Sharuɗɗan. Za mu sabunta kwanan watan "An sabunta na ƙarshe" a saman wannan shafin.
section14.heading: 14. Canje-canje ga Sharuɗɗa

section15.body: Idan kana da tambayoyi game da waɗannan Sharuɗɗan, za ka iya tuntube mu ta dandalin al'ummar Manhajar ko ta bayanan tuntuɓar da aka jera akan jwstudy.org.
section15.heading: 15. Tuntuɓa

section2.body1: JW Study mai bin diddigin karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki kyauta ne da dandalin al'umma da aka tsara don masu karatun Sabuwar Duniya Fassara. Manhajar tana ba da abubuwa masu zuwa kyauta ga masu amfani masu rajista:

body2.text: Babu matakan biya, babu biyan kuɗi na musamman, kuma babu abubuwan da aka rufe a bayan biya. Duk masu amfani masu rajista suna da damar samun duk abubuwan.

section2.body3: Muna riƙe haƙƙin gyara, dakatarwa, ko dakatar da kowane ɓangare na sabis a kowane lokaci.
section2.heading: 2. Bayyani na Sabis

ai.text: , mai taimakon AI da ke fitowa daga littattafan JW da wol.jw.org kawai

blog.text: , karanta da rubuta talifofin da suka shafi JW, bar sharhi

forum.text: , shiga cikin tattaunawa da aka tsara ta nau'i

meeting.text: , kayan aiki don shirya tarukan ikilisiya na tsakiyar mako da na ƙarshen mako

profiles.text: , bayanan jama'a da ke nuna abubuwan da ka cika a karatu da gudummawa

quizzes.text: , quizzes na ilimin Littafi Mai Tsarki bisa abun cikin NWT

tracker.bold: Mai bin diddigin karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki
tracker.text: , bi diddigin ci gabanka na sirri ta dukan littattafai 66 na NWT

videos.text: , abun cikin bidiyo na JW da aka tsara daga masu kirkira da aka amince

section3.body1: Dole ne ka kirkiri asusu don samun damar yawancin abubuwa. Kai ne ke da alhakin kiyaye sirrin shaidar asusunka kuma na duk ayyukan da ke faruwa a ƙarƙashin asusunka. Dole ne ka samar da bayanai daidai sa'ad da rajista.

body2.text: Dole ne ka kasance aƙalla shekaru 13 don amfani da wannan Manhaja. Masu amfani tsakanin shekaru 13 da 17 dole ne su sami izini daga iyaye ko mai kula na shari'a. Ta hanyar kirkirar asusu, ka tabbatar cewa ka cika wannan bukata kuma, idan ƙasa da 18, cewa iyaye ko mai kula sun sake dubawa kuma sun yarda da waɗannan Sharuɗɗa a madadinka.

section3.body3: Idan muka gano cewa asusu na mai amfani ƙasa da shekaru 13 ne, za mu kashe wannan asusu kuma mu cire bayanan da ke da alaƙa ba tare da sanarwa ba.
section3.heading: 3. Asusun Mai Amfani & Bukatun Shekaru

section4.body1: Kana riƙe mallaka na abun cikin da ka kirkira (saƙonnin shafi, tarukan dandalin, amsoshi, sharhi, rubutu, da bayanan bayanin). Ta hanyar buga abun ciki, kana ba JW Study lasisi mara cire haraji, ba tare da musamman ba don nuna abun cikin a cikin Manhaja.
section4.body2: Ka yarda kar ka buga abun cikin da yake:
section4.heading: 4. Abun cikin Mai Amfani

list.item1: Mai ƙiyayya, cin zarafi, tursasawa, ko barazana ga kowane mutum ko rukuni
list.item2: Bayyana ta hanyar jima'i ko hoto na batsa ta kowace hanya
list.item3: Mai cutarwa, cin zarafi, ko jima'i ga ƙananan yara ta kowace hanya
list.item4: Spam, bayanan ƙarya, ko ɓatarwa da gangan
list.item5: Wanda ya keta mallakar hankali na wani mutum
list.item6: Haramun a ƙarƙashin doka mai aiki
list.item7: Mai ƙazanta ko amfani da harshe mai batsa, mai datti, ko mai cin mutunci
list.item8: Koyarwa ko ɗabi'u da suka saba ko sabani da Watch Tower Bible and Tract Society ko Shaidun Jehobah

section5.body1: Abokin Nazari na AI mai taimako ne mai amfani da AI wanda yake samuwa ga duk masu amfani da rajista. Yana fitowa daga littattafan Watch Tower da abun cikin jw.org/wol.jw.org kawai don amsa tambayoyin Littafi Mai Tsarki da taimaka da nazarin JW.
section5.body2: Abun cikin da AI ya samar, gami da tsare-tsaren shafi, ana ba da shi azaman mafarin farawa kuma ya kamata a sake duba kafin wallafawa. JW Study ba ya tabbatar da daidaiton amsoshin AI kuma yana ƙarfafa masu amfani su tabbatar duk abun ciki da littattafan JW na hukuma.
section5.heading: 5. Abokin Nazari na AI

list.item1: An tsara AI ne don ba da taimakon nazari kawai daidai da koyarwar JW
list.item2: Tattaunawa tare da AI ana amfani da su ne kawai don samar da amsoshi, ba a raba su a fili
list.item3: Kar ka yi amfani da AI don samar da abun ciki da ya keta waɗannan Sharuɗɗa, gami da abun cutarwa, haramtaccen, ko abun cikin ridda
list.item4: Kar ka yi yunƙurin sarrafa AI don samar da abun ciki bayan dalilin da aka yi niyya

section6.body1: Don kare sirri da amincin duk masu amfani, musamman ƙananan yara, masu zuwa an haramta sosai a duk abun cikin da mai amfani ya samar, gami da saƙonnin dandalin, saƙonnin shafi, sharhi, bayanin bayanai, da sunaye masu nuni:
section6.body2: Waɗannan ƙuntatawa suna nan don kiyaye wannan a matsayin yanayi mai aminci, mai zaman kansa kuma don hana amfani da Manhajar don musayar bayanan tuntuɓa ko karkatar da masu amfani zuwa dandali na waje. Tsarinmu na atomatik suna binciken duk abun ciki kafin a mika kuma za su toshe duk wani saƙo da ya ƙunshi bayanan da aka haramta.
section6.heading: 6. Bayanan Sirri & Manufar Mahaɗa

address.text: , adireshin titi, adireshin gida, ko wuraren taro

email.text: , kar ka raba naka ko na kowa imel

social.text: , hanyoyi zuwa ko sunaye @username don Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, Snapchat, YouTube, LinkedIn, Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, ko irin waɗannan dandali

section7.body1: Amincin yara fifiko ne mara musantawa a JW Study. Muna da manufar babu haƙuri ga kowane abun ciki ko hali da ke jefa cikin haɗari, cin zarafi, ko jima'i ga ƙananan yara.
section7.body2: Masu zuwa an haramta sosai kuma za su haifar da haramtawa har abada nan da nan:

body3.bold: Za mu yi rahoton keta dokoki ga hukumomi.
body3.text: Duk wani abun ciki ko hali da muka gano da ke da hannu cikin cin zarafin yara ta hanyar jima'i za a yi rahoto nan da nan ga:

section7.body4: Muna riƙe duk bayanan asusu masu dacewa, adireshin IP, lokuta, da abun ciki da ke da alaƙa da keta dokokin da aka ruwaito kuma za mu yi haɗin gwiwa sosai da bincike-binciken jami'an tsaro.

body5.bold: Idan ka ga halin da zai iya jefa yaro cikin haɗari a wannan dandali, da fatan ka yi rahoto nan da nan
body5.text: ta amfani da fasalin rahoto da ke akwai akan kowane saƙo ko bayanin, ko ka tuntube mu kai tsaye. Idan ka yi imanin yaro yana cikin haɗari nan take, tuntuɓi sabis na gaggawa na cikin gida (911 a Amurka) da farko.

section7.heading: 🛡️ 7. Manufar Amincin Yara

list1.item1: Kayan Cin Zarafin Yara (CSAM) na kowane iri, hotuna, rubutu, bidiyo, ko hanyoyi
list1.item2: Halin grooming, yunƙurin gina dangantakar da ba ta dace ba da ƙananan yara don samun amincewarsu don cin zarafi
list1.item3: Neman bayanan sirri daga ƙananan yara, gami da shekaru, wuri, makaranta, ko bayanan tuntuɓa
list1.item4: Duk wani abun cikin jima'i da aka jagoranci zuwa ga ko ya shafi ƙananan yara
list1.item5: Yunƙurin matsar da tattaunawa tare da ƙarami zuwa wani dandali don manufar cin zarafi

item1.bold: Cibiyar Ƙasa ta Yara da suka Bata da kuma waɗanda ake Cin Zarafi (NCMEC)
item1.text: ta CyberTipline a CyberTipLine.org, kamar yadda dokar tarayya ta Amurka ta buƙata (18 U.S.C. § 2258A)

item2.text: da hukumomi na ƙasa masu dacewa a yankin mai amfani

item3.text: ga lamuran ƙasa da ƙasa da suka shafi hotunan cin zarafin yara ta jima'i

section8.body1: JW Study dandali ne na al'umma mai mai da hankali na ruhaniya. Muna roƙon duk masu amfani su yi hulɗa cikin girmamawa kuma a hanyar da ta dace da ɗabi'un al'umma. Muhawara da nufin nuna bangaranci ko rashin girmamawa ga imanin sauran masu amfani ba a yarda da ita ba.
section8.body2: Wannan al'umma ce da aka gina akan girmamawa juna da imani na haɗin kai. Da fatan a ci gaba da duk tattaunawa cikin ɗagawa, ginawa, kuma ba tare da gaba ba.
section8.heading: 8. Ƙa'idodin Al'umma

section9.body1: Keta waɗannan Sharuɗɗa, gami da buga abun cikin da aka haramta, yunƙurin keta tace ta atomatik, ko shiga cikin halin cutarwa ga sauran masu amfani, na iya haifar da:
section9.body2: Mu na riƙe haƙƙin ɗaukar mataki na aiwatarwa a hankalin mu kawai. Ba mu da wajibi mu ba da gargaɗi kafin mu ɗauki mataki.
section9.heading: 9. Aiwatarwa & Haramtawa Asusu

ban.text: , keta dokoki masu tsanani ko maimaitawa za su haifar da haramtawa har abada ba tare da haƙƙin ɗaukaka ƙara ba

suspension.text: , asusunka na iya zama dakatarwa har sai an yi sake duba

bookAuthors: Ba a sani ba (mai yiwuwa Musa)
Ba a sani ba (mai yiwuwa Bulus, Afolos, ko Barnaba)
bookHighlights: Labarin halittu: Jehobah ya halicci sammai, ƙasa, da dukan rayuwa cikin kwanaki shida na halitta, ya kammala da mutane da aka yi cikin surarsa (1:1–2:25)
Faɗuwar mutum: Shaiɗan, ta amfani da maciji, ya yaudari Hauwa'u; annabci na farko a 3:15 ya yi annabcin murƙushe Shaiɗan ta wurin Zuriya da aka yi alkawari
Ambaliyar: Biyayyar Nuhu mai aminci ta tsare ɗan adam da rayuwar dabbobi yayin da aka hukunta mugunta (6–9)
Hasumiyar Babel: Girman kai na mutum ya kawo rabuwar harsuna da watsuwar mutane a cikin ƙasa (11:1–9)
Alkawarin Ibrahim: Jehobah ya kira Abram ya kuma kafa alkawari yana yin alkawarin zuriya da ta wurinta dukan al'ummai za su sami albarka (12–22)
Yusufu a Masar: Duk da cin amana da bauta, Jehobah ya tsare Yusufu kuma ya yi amfani da shi ya ceci dukan iyalinsa (37–50)
Haihuwar Musa da kiransa: An tsare shi tun jariri, Musa ya gamu da Jehobah a cikin ƙayar da ke ƙonewa kuma ya koyi sunan Allah (1–4)
Annoba goma a kan Masar: Jehobah ya zartar da hukunci a kan kowane allahn Masar, yana nuna fifikonsa a kan dukan bauta ta ƙarya (7–12)
Idin Ƙetarewa da Fitowa: An tsare Isra'ila ta wurin jinin ɗan rago, sai ya fita Masar ta hanyar mu'ujiza bayan shekaru 430 (12–14)
Ƙetare Bahar Maliya: Jehobah ya raba teku, ya ceci Isra'ila kuma ya hallaka rundunar Fir'auna (14:21–31)
Alkawarin Dokar a Sinai: Jehobah ya ba da Dokoki Goma da littafin Doka, ya kafa Isra'ila a matsayin al'ummarsa ta musamman (19–24)
Tabanakal: Cikakkun umarni don gina wurin zaman Jehobah a tsakanin mutanensa (25–40)
Tsarin hadayu: Nau'i biyar na hadayu (ƙonawa, gari, salama, zunubi, laifi) sun bayyana yadda Isra'ila ta kusaci Jehobah don bauta da kafara (1–7)
Keɓe firistoci: An shafe Haruna da 'ya'yansa kuma aka keɓe su don hidimar Lawiyawa (8–9)
Nadab da Abihu: Wuta da ba a yarda da ita ba a gaban Jehobah ya nuna cewa bauta mai tsabta dole ta bi umarnan Jehobah daidai (10)
Dokokin tsabta da jini: Tsarkin jini (17:11) shi ne tushen haramcin cin jini, har yanzu yana ɗaure wa Kiristoci
Ranar Kafara: Bikin tsarkakewa na shekara-shekara ya zama hoton hadayar Yesu Kristi mafi girma a matsayin Babban Firist (16)
Shekarar Jubili: Kowace shekara 50, ana soke bashi kuma ana 'yantar da bayi — hoton tsarin Jehobah mafi girma na 'yanci (25)
Ƙidaya da tsari: An ƙidaya Isra'ila kuma aka tsara su a kowace kabila a kewayen tabanakal, yana nuna cewa Jehobah yana daraja tsari a bauta (1–4)
Aikin 'yan leƙen asiri zuwa Kan'ana: Goma daga cikin 'yan leƙen asiri goma sha biyu sun ba da rahoton rashin imani; rashin imanin al'umma ya kai ga yawo a jeji na shekaru 40 (13–14)
Tawayen Kora: Kora, Datan, da Abiram sun ƙalubalanci ikon Musa kuma ƙasa ta haɗiye su, yana tabbatar da nadin Jehobah (16)
Macijin tagulla: Isra'ilawan da macizai suka cije sun warke ta wurin dubin macijin tagulla — alama wadda Yesu ya yi amfani da ita ga kansa (21:4–9; Yohanna 3:14)
Annabcin Bala'amu: An ɗauke shi ya la'anci Isra'ila, Bala'amu zai iya albarkace su kawai, yana tabbatar da cewa ba wanda zai iya hana nufin Jehobah (22–24)
Himmar Finehas: Aikinsa mai ƙarfi a kan fasikanci ya tsayar da annoba kuma ya samu 'alkawarin salama' daga wurin Jehobah (25)
Jawabi na farko na Musa: Ya yi nazarin tarihin shekaru 40 na jeji kuma ya bayyana dalilin da ya sa tsararraki suka kasa (1–4)
Shema da babbar doka: Jehobah ɗaya ne; Isra'ila dole ta ƙaunace shi da dukan zuciya, rai, da ƙarfi (6:4–9)
Gargaɗi game da arziki: An gargaɗi Isra'ila kada ta manta da Jehobah lokacin da suke arziki a ƙasar (8)
Annabi kamar Musa: Jehobah ya yi alkawari zai tashe annabi daga cikin Isra'ila — an cika a Yesu Kristi (18:15–19)
Albarka da la'ana: Cikakkun sharuɗɗan alkawari — biyayya ta kawo albarka, rashin biyayya ta kawo hukunci (28)
Waƙar bankwana ta Musa da mutuwarsa: Musa ya koya wa Isra'ila waƙar gargaɗi, ya albarkaci kabilun, kuma ya mutu a Dutsen Nebo yana da shekara 120 (31–34)
Ƙetare Urdun: Jehobah ya tsai da gudun Urdun saboda Isra'ila ta iya ƙetarewa a kan ƙasa busasshiya, yana tunatar da mu'ujizar Bahar Maliya (3–4)
Rahab da 'yan leƙen asiri: Imanin Rahab ya ceci iyalinta kuma ya samu ta wuri a tsararraki na Almasihu (2; 6:22–25)
Faɗuwar Yariko: Garu sun fāɗi bisa umarnin Jehobah bayan Isra'ila ta yi tafiya kwanaki bakwai — nasara tasa ce (6)
Zunubin Akan: Hadama ta mutum ɗaya ta kawo kayar baya a Ai, yana nuna yadda zunubin mutum ya shafi al'umma duka (7)
Sabunta alkawari a Shekem: Joshuwa ya jagoranci al'umma cikin sake jajircewa na yin hidima ga Jehobah kaɗai (24)
An cika kowane alkawari: Tarihi yana faɗin a sarari cewa 'babu kalmar da ta gaza daga dukan alkawuran da Jehobah ya yi' (21:45)
Zagayowar da ke maimaituwa: Zunubi → zalunci → kuka → Jehobah ya tashi mai hukunci → ceto → salama → maimaituwa (2:11–19)
Debora da Barak: Mahukunciya mace da janar sun ci nasara a kan rundunar Sisera; Yael ta kashe Sisera da gungumen alfarwa (4–5)
300 na Gidiyon: Jehobah ya rage rundunar Isra'ila daga 32,000 zuwa 300 don tabbatar da cewa nasara tasa ce (7)
Alkawarin Yefta: Alkawarinsa mai gaggawa yana da sakamako mai dadewa; 'yarsa ta girmama shi da biyayya mai aminci (11)
Samsuna: Ƙarfin jiki mai girma, amma rauni ga matan baƙi ƙarshe ya kai shi ga kamewa da mutuwa (13–16)
Hargitsi na ɗabi'a: Surori na ƙarshe sun rubuta yaƙin basasa na kabila da cin zarafin jima'i, yana nuna sakamakon 'kowa yana yi yadda ya ga dama' (21:25)
Amincin Rut: Bayan mutuwar mijinta, Rut ta ƙi barin Na'omi, ta ce 'Allahnki zai zama Allahna' — ta zaɓi Jehobah a kan kabilarta ta Mowab (1)
Tara hatsi a gonar Bo'aza: Tanadin Dokar Jehobah ga matalauta ya bar Rut ta tara hatsi, inda Bo'aza ya lura da ita (2)
Masussukar dawa: Bisa umarnin Na'omi, Rut ta kusaci Bo'aza a matsayin mai fanshe iyali (3)
Fansa ta shari'a: Bo'aza ya fanshe dukiyar Na'omi ya kuma auri Rut a gaban dattawan birni a ƙofa (4:1–12)
Haihuwar Obed: Rut ta haifi ɗa wanda ya zama kakan Sarki Dauda kuma kakannin Yesu Kristi (4:13–22)
Addu'ar Hanna da haihuwar Sama'ila: Addu'ar Hanna ta nacewa ta sami tagomashin Jehobah; ta keɓe Sama'ila ga hidimarsa (1–2)
Akwatin alkawari ya kama: Yadda Isra'ila ta ɗauki Akwati a matsayin abin sa'a ya kai ga kayar baya da hukuncin Jehobah a kan iyalin Eli (4–6)
Isra'ila tana neman sarki: Tana ƙin Jehobah a matsayin sarkinta, Isra'ila ta nemi mai mulki na mutum; an zaɓi Shawulu (8–10)
Kasawar Shawulu na maimaituwa: Biyayyar Shawulu da ba ta cika ba a hadayar da kuma a batun Amalekawa ya bayyana cewa zuciyarsa ba ta da aminci sosai (13; 15)
An shafe Dauda a ɓoye: Sama'ila ya shafe Dauda yayin da Shawulu yana sarauta; Jehobah yana dubi zuciya (16)
Dauda da Goliyat: Da makamai na imani ga Jehobah kawai da majajjawa, Dauda ya ci nasara a kan ƙato wanda ya ƙalubalanci rundunar Jehobah (17)
Dauda ya zama sarki: Bayan mutuwar Shawulu, an shafe Dauda a kan dukan Isra'ila kuma ya kama Urushalima, yana mai da ita babban birninsa (1–5)
Alkawarin Dauda: Jehobah ya yi wa Dauda alkawari cewa kursiyinsa zai tabbata har abada — annabci na Almasihu da yake nuni ga Yesu Kristi (7)
Zunubin Dauda da Bat-shaba: Zina da kisan kai sun fallasa cewa zunubi ba ya ɓoye daga gaban Jehobah (11–12)
Misalin Natan: Yadda annabi ya yi amfani da labari don tunkari Dauda ba tare da zargi kai tsaye ba misali ne na shawarwarin hikima (12:1–14)
Tawayen Absalom: Rashin horon Dauda ga Absalom ya kai ga juyin mulki da kusan ya yi nasara; Dauda ya gudu daga Urushalima (15–18)
Ayyukan ƙarshe na Dauda: Dauda ya ƙidaya Isra'ila a wani aikin girman kai, yana kawo annoba; daga baya ya sami wurin haikalin (24)
Hikimar Sulemanu: Jehobah ya bai wa Sulemanu hikima ta musamman; hukuncinsa game da mata biyu ya nuna inda ta fito (3)
Gina Haikali: An gina Haikali mai daraja a shekaru bakwai kuma ɗaukakar Jehobah ta cika shi a keɓewarsa (5–8)
Raguwar ruhaniya ta Sulemanu: Matan baƙi sun jirkita zuciyar Sulemanu zuwa ga gumakan ƙarya, yana nuna cewa babu wanda yake da kariya daga sasantawa ta ruhaniya (11)
Rabuwar mulki: Amsar Rehoboam mai zafi ga buƙatar mutane ya raba mulki zuwa Isra'ila (arewa) da Yahuda (kudu) (12)
Iliya da annabawan Ba'al: Faɗuwa a Dutsen Karmel ya tabbatar cewa Jehobah kaɗai ne Allah; wuta daga sama ta cinye hadaya (18)
Murya mai laushi: Bayan manyan nasarori, Jehobah ya wartsake Iliya da abinci, hutu, da kwantarwa mai laushi (19)
Tafiyar Iliya: An ɗauke Iliya cikin guguwa, ya ba Elisha alkyabbar annabci, sannan ya yi mu'ujizai ninki biyu fiye da Iliya (2)
Hidimar Elisha: Mu'ujizai na Elisha — yawaita mai, tashin ɗan Shunamiya, warkar da Na'aman — sun nuna ƙarfin Jehobah da jinƙansa (4–7)
Imanin Hezekiya: Sa'ad da rundunar Assuriya 185,000 ta kewaye shi, Hezekiya ya yi addu'a kuma mala'ikan Jehobah ya hallaka dukan rundunar a dare ɗaya (18–19)
Gyaran Yosiya: Gano littafin Jehobah ya jawo babban gyaran addini a tarihin Yahuda (22–23)
Faɗuwar Isra'ila: Mulkin arewa ya faɗi ga Assuriya a 740 K.Z. saboda bauta wa Ba'al da kuma ƙin annabawan Jehobah (17)
Faɗuwar Urushalima: Babila ta hallaka Urushalima da Haikali a 607 K.Z., tana cika gargaɗin Jehobah ta hannun annabawansa (25)
Tsararraki tun Adam: Tsararraki mai yawa daga Adam ta hanyar kabilun goma sha biyu ya sa zuriyar Dauda a cikin tsarin Jehobah duka (1–9)
Cin Urushalima na Dauda: Dauda ya kama birnin kuma ya mai da shi cibiyar ruhaniya da siyasa na mutanen Jehobah (11)
An kawo Akwati Urushalima: Yunƙuri na biyu mai hankali na kawo Akwatin ya yi nasara; Dauda ya jagoranci bikin da rawa da kiɗa (15–16)
Sha'awar Dauda na gina Haikali: Ko da Jehobah ya ba da aikin gini ga Sulemanu, Dauda ya tara kayan aiki masu yawa don shirya (17; 22; 28–29)
Tsarin firistoci da Lawiyawa: Dauda ya kafa rabe-rabe na tsari don bauta, kiɗa, tsaron ƙofa, da kula da ma'aji (23–27)
Umarnin ƙarshe na Dauda: Karkanin jama'a na Dauda ga Sulemanu da mutane su zama masu cikakkiyar zuciya a gaban Jehobah (28–29)
An kammala Haikalin Sulemanu: Keɓewar Haikali, addu'ar Sulemanu, da ɗaukakar Jehobah ta cika ginin ta nuna mafi girman lokacin bautar Isra'ila (5–7)
Alkawarin Jehobah ga Sulemanu: 'Idan mutanena... suka ƙasƙantar da kansu kuma suka yi addu'a... zan gafarta zunubinsu in warkar da ƙasarsu' (7:14)
Rikicin Yehoshafat: An mamaye shi da runduna mai yawa, Yehoshafat ya yi addu'a, kuma Jehobah ya gaya masa 'yaƙin ba naka ba ne, amma na Allah ne' (20)
Gyare-gyaren ruhaniya: Sarakuna Asa, Yehoshafat, Hezekiya, da Yosiya sun jagoranci tsarkakewa mai yawa na bauta ta ƙarya, kowa yana samun albarkar Jehobah (14–15; 29–32; 34–35)
Urushalima ta faɗi: Duk da maimaituwar gargaɗi, rashin amincin Yahuda na nacewa ya kai ga hallaka Haikali da birni daga Babila (36)
Doka ta Sairus: Littafi ya rufe da Sairus yana izini ga waɗanda aka kora su koma — yana cika annabcin Irmiya zuwa shekarar (36:22–23)
Komawa ta farko a ƙarƙashin Zerubabel: Kusan kora 50,000 sun koma Urushalima; sun fara da gina bagade ga Jehobah (1–3)
An hana sake gina Haikali: Maƙiya sun yi nasara wajen tsayar da gini shekaru 16 ta wurin rubuta wasiƙu zuwa kotun Farisa (4)
Hagai da Zakariya sun kara aiki: Karfafa ta annabci ya sake fara gini; an kammala shi a 516 K.Z. (5–6)
Komawar Ezra: Firist-marubuci Ezra ya jagoranci ƙungiya ta biyu da ta koma, yana ɗauke da iko don kafa Dokar Jehobah a Urushalima (7–8)
Addu'ar Ezra ta furta laifi: Tana gano yawan aure da baƙi, Ezra ya yi addu'a mai zurfin furta laifin al'umma (9)
Gyaran ruhaniya: An wargaza aure masu cakuɗi a wani taro mai motsa rai; mutanen Jehobah sun sake jajirce ga alkawarinsa (10)
Addu'a da aikin Nehemiya: Bayan jin cewa garun Urushalima sun karye, Nehemiya ya yi addu'a sannan da gaba gaɗi ya tambayi Artazerzes izinin sake ginawa (1–2)
An sake gina garu cikin kwanaki 52: Duk da ba'a da barazana daga Sanballat da Tobiya, Nehemiya ya tsara mutane kuma ya kammala garu (3–6)
An magance rashin adalci na tattalin arziki: Nehemiya ya tunkari masu daraja waɗanda suke karɓar riba mai yawa kuma ya tilasta su mayar da abin da suka karɓa (5)
Ezra ya karanta Doka: A wani babban taro na jama'a, Ezra ya karanta Dokar Jehobah da ƙarfi don sa'o'i shida; mutane sun yi kuka da fahimta kuma suka yi murna (8)
An sa hannu kan alkawari: Mutane sun rubuta jajircensu na kiyaye Dokar Jehobah, ciki har da Asabar da na zakka (9–10)
Mulkin Nehemiya na biyu: Yana komawa bayan rashi, Nehemiya ya sami cewa wasu munanan ayyuka sun komo ya kuma ɗauki matakai masu ƙarfi (13)
Esther ta zama sarauniya: Esther kyakkyawa ce aka zaɓa sarauniya ta Sarki Ahasweros, tana ɓoye yahudawancinta bisa umarnin Mordekai (1–2)
Makircin Haman: Haman mai girman kai, da fushinsa game da ƙin Mordekai ya yi sujada, ya sami doka ta sarki don kashe dukan Yahudawa (3)
Ƙalubalen Mordekai: 'Wa ya san ko ba don wani lokaci kamar wannan ne ka isa matsayin sarautarki ba?' (4:14)
Kusantar Esther mai gaba gaɗi: Tana jefa ranta cikin haɗari, Esther ta kusanci sarkin ba a gayyace ta ba kuma ta gayyace shi da Haman zuwa biki (5)
Faɗuwar Haman: Girman kan Haman ya kai ƙololuwarsa lokacin da ya shirya gunki don Mordekai; sarkin ya umarci a rataye Haman a kansa (6–7)
Cetar Yahudawa: Esther ta sami dokar warwarewa; Yahudawa sun kare kansu kuma suka yi murna da bikin Purim (8–9)
Yanayin sama: Shaiɗan yana ƙalubalantar cewa Ayuba yana bauta wa Jehobah saboda dalilai na zahiri kawai; Jehobah ya bar Shaiɗan ya gwada shi (1–2)
Amincin Ayuba a ƙarƙashin asara mai tsanani: Ayuba ya rasa 'ya'yansa, dukiya, da lafiyarsa da sauri, amma ya ƙi la'antar Jehobah (1:21; 2:10)
Shawarwarin abokai uku da ba ta dace ba: Elifaz, Bildad, da Zofar sun nace cewa shan wahala ko da yaushe yana nuna zunubi mai ɓoye — ta'aziyya ta ƙarya da zalunci (3–31)
Gudunmawar Elihu: Wani matashi mai magana ya ba da ra'ayi mai cikakke, yana nanata manufar Jehobah ta koyarwa cikin shan wahala (32–37)
Jehobah yana magana daga guguwa: Jerin tambayoyi marasa amsa game da halittu sun ƙasƙantar da Ayuba kuma sun faɗaɗa fahimtarsa ​​game da hikimar Jehobah (38–41)
Maido da Ayuba: Jehobah ya maido ninki biyu na abin da Ayuba ya rasa kuma ya tsawatar wa abokai uku saboda ba sa wakiltarsa daidai (42)
Zabura na sarauta sun yi bikin sarautar Jehobah kuma sun yi annabcin Sarkin Almasihu: Zabura 2, 45, 72, 110
Zabura na kuka misali ne na addu'a mai gaskiya cikin shan wahala da shakka: Zabura 22, 42, 88
Zabura na yabo suna koyar da bautar al'umma da ta mutum: Zabura 8, 19, 100, 145, 150
Zabura 119 — sura mafi tsayi a cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki — gaba ɗaya ta keɓe ga kyau da darajar dokar Jehobah (ayoyi 176)
Zabura na Almasihu sun ba da cikakkun bayanai da Yesu ya cika: hannuwa da aka soka (22:16), kasusuwa ba a karya su ba (34:20), ci amana don tsabar azurfa 30 (41:9; 109:8)
Zabura 83:18 ta musamman ta bayyana cewa Jehobah kaɗai ne 'Maɗaukaki a kan dukan ƙasa' — tushen fahimtar SJ game da sunan Allah
An ba hikima halayyar mutum: Surori 1–9 sun ba hikima halayyar mutum, tana kira a tituna, tana gayyatar masu sauƙi su zaɓi rai a kan wauta
Tsoron Jehobah a matsayin tushe: Dukan hikima ta gaskiya tana farawa da girmamawar Jehobah (1:7; 9:10)
Karin magana game da magana: Shawarwari masu yawa game da magana ta gaskiya, alheri, da kan lokaci a kan harshe mai ɓarna (10–15; 18:21)
Zuciya a kan kamannin waje: Jehobah yana gani kuma yana auna zuciya (21:2); amincin mutum ya fi suna muhimmanci
Gargaɗi a kan fasikanci: Mata mai zina da mace baƙo gargaɗi ne masu kayatarwa a kan sasantawar ɗabi'a (5–7)
Mace mai iya iko: Karin Magana 31:10–31 ta yi bikin matar mai aiki, hikima, da halin tsoron Allah a matsayin abin koyi
Gwajin Sulemanu: Mai Wa'azin ya gwada hikima, jin daɗi, dukiya, da nasara don gano ma'anar rayuwa — duka sun nuna banza ba tare da Jehobah ba (1–2)
Lokuta da yanayi: 'Akwai lokaci ga kowane dalili ƙarƙashin sama' yana kira ga amincewa ga lokacin Jehobah maimakon yin ƙoƙari mai damuwa (3:1–8)
Matattu ba su san komai ba: Furucin a sarari game da yanayin matattu na rashin sani ya goyi bayan begen tashin matattu na Littafi Mai Tsarki (9:5, 10)
Cin zarafin addini: Bauta mara kome ta al'ada 'wadda Jehobah ba ya daraja' an bambanta da girmamawar gaskiya ga maganarsa (5:1–7)
Matasa da Mahalicci: 'Tuna da Mahalicinka a kwanakin samartakarka' — kafin nauyin rayuwa ya sa cikakkiyar hidima ta yi wuya (12:1)
Ƙarshe gaba ɗaya: Bayan dukan binciken, kawai manufa mai ɗorewa ita ce tsoron Jehobah da kiyaye dokokinsa (12:13–14)
Amincin Bashulamiyan: 'Yar ƙauye ta kasance mai aminci ga makiyayinta ƙaunatacciya duk da arziki da abubuwan jan hankali na kotun Sulemanu (1–3)
Yabon juna: Miji da mata kowa yana bayyana kyawun ɗayan da ƙauna — yana zama abin koyi a cikin yabon magana cikin aure (4–5)
Ƙarfin ƙauna: 'Ƙauna tana da ƙarfi kamar mutuwa... harsunan wuta sune harshen wutar Yah' — ƙauna tsakanin miji da mata yana nuna tsarin Jehobah (8:6–7)
Muryar ƙaunatacciya: Sha'awar Bashulamiyan don dawowar mijinta yana nuna sha'awar dukan zuciya na cikakken dangantaka (2:8–14)
An kwatanta kishi: 'Kishi yana da taurin kai kamar Kabari' — gargaɗi cewa wannan motsin rai mai ƙarfi dole a tsare shi a iyakar aure (8:6)
Kiran Ishaya: Wahayi na kursiyin sama na Jehobah da serafim suna kira 'mai tsarki, mai tsarki, mai tsarki' ya kai ga kiran Ishaya da niyya (6)
Annabcin Imanu'el: 'Duba, budurwa za ta ɗauki ciki kuma ta haifi ɗa kuma ta sa masa suna Imanu'el' (7:14) — an cika a haihuwar Yesu
Waƙoƙin Bawan Wahala: Waƙoƙi huɗu (42; 49; 50; 52–53) sun bayyana da daidaito mai ban mamaki hidimar Almasihu da mutuwarsa ta kafara
Ta'aziyya ga waɗanda aka kora: 'Kada ka ji tsoro, gama ina tare da kai' da 'masu jiran Jehobah za su sake ƙarfafa' (40:28–31; 41:10; 43:1–5)
Jehobah a kan gumaka: Wani satira mai zafi game da bautar gumaka ya bambanta Allah Mahalicci da gunkin itace (44:9–20; 46:1–7)
Alkawuran sabuwar duniya: Salama ƙarƙashin Mulkin Allah, inda 'kerkeci za ta zauna tare da ɗan rago' kuma mutuwa ba za ta sake kasancewa ba (65:17–25; 25:8)
Kiran Irmiya: Tun kafin haihuwa Jehobah ya san shi; duk da gunaguni na annabi game da rashin ƙwarewa, an naɗa shi annabi ga al'ummai (1)
Wa'azin Haikali: Irmiya da gaba gaɗi ya yi wa'azi a ƙofar Haikali cewa shi ba kariya ba ne idan mutane ba su yi biyayya ga Jehobah ba — za a hallaka shi kamar Shilo (7; 26)
Gidan mai yin tukunya: Jehobah ya kwatanta ikon mallakarsa na sake fasalin kowace al'umma da ta amsa maganarsa (18)
Shan wahalar Irmiya: An ɗaure shi, aka jefa shi a rijiya, aka tuhume shi da cin amanar ƙasa — Irmiya ya jure mafi tsananin tsanantawa fiye da kowane annabi na Ibrananci (37–38)
Wasiƙa zuwa ga waɗanda aka kora: Daga Babila, Irmiya ya rubuta don ƙarfafa waɗanda aka kama su gina, su shuka, kuma su nemi salamar birni (29)
Alkawarin sabon alkawari: Jehobah zai rubuta Dokarsa a zuciya — tsari mafi kyau wanda Yesu Kristi ya yi shi (31:31–34)
Makoki na farko: An kwatanta Urushalima a matsayin matar gwauruwa da aka watsar; birni yana kuka game da hallakarsa da watsuwar mutanensa (1)
Fushin adalci na Jehobah: Mawaƙin ya yarda cewa hallakar Urushalima ta zo saboda zunubanta — hukuncin Jehobah ya kasance adali (2)
Waƙa ta tsakiya: 'Ƙaunar Jehobah mai aminci ba ta ƙarewa; jinƙansa ba sa ƙarewa; ana sabunta su kowace safiya' — anka na bege a cikin baƙin ciki mafi zurfi na littafin (3:22–23)
Kira don nazarin kai: 'Bari mu bincika kuma mu yi nazarin hanyoyinmu, mu koma ga Jehobah' (3:40) — amsa ta dace ga horon Jehobah
Furucin laifi na ƙasa: Waƙoƙi na huɗu da na biyar sun furta zunuban da suka kawo halaka kuma sun nemi maidowa daga Jehobah (4–5)
Tsarin acrostic: Huɗu daga cikin waƙoƙi biyar acrostic ne (kowane aya ta fara da haruffan jerin haruffan Ibrananci), yana nuna fasaha ta adabi mai hankali
Wahayin kursiyi-keken yaƙi: Wahayi mai ban mamaki na halittu masu rai huɗu, ƙafafu, da kursiyin Jehobah ya tabbatar da ikon mallakarsa cikakke (1–3)
Ezekiyel a matsayin mai gadi: Jehobah ya naɗa shi mai gadi wanda alhakinsa shine yin gargaɗi — yana nuna alhakin dukan bayin Jehobah na yin wa'azi (3; 33)
Tafiyar ɗaukakar Jehobah: Mataki bayan mataki, ɗaukakar Jehobah ta tafi daga Haikali da birni masu lalata kafin hallaka (10–11)
Alhakin mutum: 'Ran da ya yi zunubi shi zai mutu' — kowane mutum yana da alhakin zaɓinsa a gaban Jehobah (18)
Kwarin busassun kasusuwa: Wahayi mai ƙarfi na tashin matattu ya yi annabcin maido da Isra'ila ta jiki da kuma tashin matattu na gaba (37)
Wahayin Haikalin nan gaba: Cikakkun ma'auni na Haikalin da aka kammala sun bayyana tsarin bauta mai tsabta ga mizanan Jehobah (40–48)
Amincin Daniyel a abinci: A kotun sarauta ta Babila, Daniyel da abokansa sun ƙi abincin sarki kuma sun fi lafiya (1)
Mafarki na siffar Nebukadnezzar: Babbar siffa da ke wakiltar manyan ikoki na duniya bisa ga zamani da dutsen — Mulkin Jehobah — ya bugi kuma ya cika duniya (2)
Tanderun wuta: Shadrak, Meshak, da Abednego sun ƙi su yi sujada ga siffar zinariya ta Nebukadnezzar; Jehobah ya cece su (3)
Rubutu a bango: Belshazzar ya ƙazantar da kayan Haikali a wani biki; rubutu mai ban mamaki ya sanar da faɗuwar Babila a wannan dare (5)
Kogon zakuna: Maƙiyan Daniyel sun kama shi ta wurin al'adar addu'arsa; Jehobah ya rufe bakunan zakuna (6)
Dabbobi huɗu da Mai Tsohon Kwanaki: Wahayi na manyan ikoki na duniya bisa ga zamani da kotun Jehobah tana bayar da mulki na har abada ga Ɗan mutum (7)
Auren Hosea: Jehobah ya umarci Hosea ya auri mace marar aminci a matsayin misali rayayye na zinar Isra'ila ta ruhaniya a kan Jehobah (1–3)
Zinar ruhaniya ta Isra'ila: Al'umma ta yashe Jehobah don bauta wa Ba'al, suna danganta albarkunsa ga gumakan ƙarya (4–7)
An hukunta bauta mara kome: 'Ƙaunarku mai aminci kamar gajimare ne na safiya... ina son ƙauna mai aminci, ba hadaya ba' (6:4, 6)
Ƙaunar Jehobah mai dawwama: Duk da rashin amincin Isra'ila, zuciyar Jehobah tana sha'awar maido da su, yana kwatanta kansa da iyaye masu ƙauna (11:1–9)
Gargaɗin korarwa: Ifraim (Isra'ila) za ta koma cikin bauta irin ta Masar a Assuriya saboda ƙin Jehobah na nacewa (11:5; 13:16)
Gayyatar dawowa: Littafi yana rufewa da kira mai laushi don komawa Jehobah da kalmomin tuba na gaskiya, da alkawari 'zan warkar da rashin amincinsu' (14:1–4)
Annobar fara: Mamayar fara mai halaka ta tuɓe ƙasa — ana amfani da ita don kira ga taro, azumi, da kira ga Jehobah (1)
Kira ga tuba na gaskiya: 'Ku tsage zukatanku ba tufafinku ba; ku koma ga Jehobah Allahnku' (2:13)
Alkawarin maidowa: Jehobah ya yi alkawarin maido da abin da fara ta ci kuma ya zubar da albarka a martani ga tuba (2:18–27)
Zubar da ruhu mai tsarki: 'Zan zubar da ruhuna a kan kowane irin nama' — an cika a Fentakos 33 A.Z. kuma Bitrus ya ambata (2:28–29; Ayyukan Manzanni 2:17–21)
Ranar Jehobah na gabatowa: Ranar duhu da hukunci a kan dukan al'ummai a kwarin Yehoshafat (3:1–16)
Maido aljanna: Bayan hukunci, mutanen Jehobah za su zauna lafiya kuma ƙasa za ta cika da yawa (3:17–21)

Hukunci a kan al'ummai: Amos ya gabatar da furuce-furuce a kan al'ummai takwas da ke kewaye da Isra'ila kafin ya juya zuwa Isra'ila kanta — babu wanda zai iya tserewa ka'idodin ɗabi'a na Jehobah (1–2)
Rashin adalcin zamantakewar Isra'ila: Masu arziki suna danne talakawa, suna karkatar da adalci, kuma suna takawa kan masu bukata yayin da suke yin al'adun addini (2:6–8; 5:10–12)
Bautar addini mara kome: Jehobah ya ƙi bukukuwan Isra'ila da tarurruka domin ba a daidaita su da adalci da gaskiya ba (5:21–24)
Wahayoyin hukunci: Wahayoyi biyar (fara, wuta, igiyar ma'auni, 'ya'yan itacen rani, bagade) sun nuna hukuncin Jehobah da ke zuwa Isra'ila (7–9)
Jehobah yana bayyana shirye-shiryensa: 'Hakika Sarkin Sarakuna Jehobah ba ya yin komai ba tare da bayyana sirrinsa ga bayinsa annabawa ba' (3:7)
Alkawarin maidowa: Za a sake gina ƙofar Dauda da ta faɗi — an ambata a Ayyukan Manzanni 15:16 a matsayin nuni ga ikilisiyar Kirista da aka maido (9:11–15)
Girman kai na Edom: Edomawa sun dogara da kagara ta dutsensu da haɗin gwiwa, amma Jehobah ya bayyana 'zan saukar da ku daga can' (1–4)
Ha'incin Edom a kan Isra'ila: Lokacin da Babila ta mamaye Urushalima, Edomawa sun yi murna, sun toshe gudun 'yan gudun hijira, kuma sun ba da 'yan tsira (10–14)
Ranar Jehobah a kan dukan al'ummai: 'Ranar Jehobah ta kusa a kan dukan al'ummai; kamar yadda ku ka yi, haka za a yi muku' (15–16)
Maido Isra'ila: Jehobah ya yi alkawari cewa ragowa a Dutsen Sihiyona za ta zama mai tsarki, kuma gidan Isuwa zai zama ƙaiƙai kawai (17–21)
Mulki na Jehobah: Littafi ya rufe da bayanin 'mulki zai zama na Jehobah' — an tabbatar da ikon mallakarsa (21)
Yunusa ya gudu: Maimakon ya je Nineba, Yunusa ya hau jirgi yana zuwa wani bangare; Jehobah ya aiko da hadari (1)
An jefa Yunusa cikin ruwa: Ya umarci ma'aikatan jirgi su jefa shi cikin teku; Jehobah ya tanada babban kifi ya haɗiye shi kwanaki uku (1:17)
Addu'ar Yunusa daga cikin kifin: Zabura ta godiya daga cikin kifin, tana yarda da cetar Jehobah (2)
Nineba ta tuba: Dukan birnin — daga sarki zuwa shanu — sun saka tsumma kuma suka juya daga munanan hanyoyinsu; Jehobah ya yafe (3)
Fushin Yunusa: Yana fushi cewa Jehobah ya nuna jinƙai, Yunusa ya zauna a ƙarƙashin tanti; Jehobah ya yi amfani da gora ya koya masa darasi game da tausayi (4)
Damuwar Jehobah game da Nineba: 'Bai kamata in ji tausayin Nineba ba... wadda a cikinta akwai sama da mutum 120,000 da ba su san dama da hagu ba?' (4:11)
Hukunci a kan Samariya da Urushalima: An yi tuhumar babban birnin biyu game da cin hanci, annabawa na ƙarya, da zaluntar talakawa (1–3)
Dutsen gidan Jehobah: Wahayi na mutane suna kwarara don koyon hanyoyin Jehobah a kwanakin ƙarshe — ana cika a yanzu (4:1–4)
An haifi Almasihu a Baitalami: 'Daga gare ka [Baitalami] zai zo mai mulki a Isra'ila, wanda asalinsa daga zamanin da' (5:2) — Yesu ya cika
Shari'ar shari'a ta Jehobah: 'Me Jehobah yake bukata daga gare ku? Sai dai ku yi aiki da adalci, ku ƙaunaci aminci, ku yi tafiya da ƙasƙantar kai tare da Allahnku' (6:8)
Imani na Mikah na sirri: Ko da yake an kewaye shi da cin hanci, Mikah ya bayyana 'zan ci gaba da jira Jehobah' (7:7)
Gafarar Jehobah marar kwatanci: 'Wane ne Allah kamarka, mai gafarta kuskure da wuce wa laifi?' — yana jefa zunubai cikin zurfin teku (7:18–19)
An bayyana halayyar Jehobah: 'Mai jinkirin fushi amma babba a iko; Jehobah ba zai bar mai laifi ba tare da hukunci ba' — duka mai jinƙai da adali (1:3)
Jehobah yana da kyau: 'Jehobah yana da kyau, kagara a ranar matsala; ya san waɗanda ke neman mafaka a cikinsa' (1:7)
An yi wa Nineba hukunci: Sama da shekara 100 bayan Yunusa, Nineba ta koma rikici da mugunta; faɗuwarta yanzu ta tabbata (2–3)
Bayanin faɗuwar Nineba: Annabi ya bayyana harin dawakai, takubba masu walƙiya, da ambaliyar kariyar birni da daidaito mai annabci (2:1–10; 3:1–3)
Birnin jini: An kira Nineba 'birnin jini' saboda yaƙe-yaƙenta na sojoji da cin zarafin al'ummomin da ke ƙarƙashinta (3:1–4)
Halaka cikakke: 'Duk wanda ya ji labarinki zai tafa hannayensu a kanki, gama wa bai sha wahala a ƙarƙashin zaluncinki marar ƙarshe ba?' (3:19)
Kuka na farko na Habakkuk: 'Har yaushe, ya Jehobah, zan yi kira don taimako kuma ba ka ji ba?' — gwagwarmaya da gaskiya game da arzikin masu mugunta (1:2–4)
Amsar farko ta Jehobah: Ana tashe Babila a matsayin kayan aikin hukuncin Jehobah — amsa mai ban tsoro ga addu'ar Habakkuk (1:5–11)
Kuka na biyu na Habakkuk: Yin amfani da kayan aiki mafi mugu fiye da wanda ake hukunta yana fito da rikici da adalcin Jehobah (1:12–17)
Amsar Jehobah ta biyu: 'Mai adalci zai rayu ta wurin amincinsa'; za a saukar da masu girman kai; sanin Jehobah zai cika ƙasa (2:2–20)
Addu'a-zabura ta Habakkuk: Waƙa mai daraja da ke ba da tarihin ayyukan Jehobah da suka gabata sun kai ga bayanin cikakke na farin ciki duk da asarar abin duniya (3)
'Ko da ba haka ba': 'Ko da ba'a yi furen ɓaure ba... zan yi farin ciki cikin Jehobah; zan yi murna cikin Allahn cetona' (3:17–18)
Ranar Jehobah na hukunci mai yaɗu: Jehobah ya sanar da hukunci mai cikakke — a kan Yahuda, al'ummomin da ke kewaye, kuma a ƙarshe duk duniya (1–2)
Ku nemi Jehobah yayin da akwai lokaci: 'Ku nemi Jehobah, dukanku masu tawali'u na duniya... ku nemi adalci, ku nemi tawali'u; watakila za a ɓoye ku' (2:3)
Bone ga masu zalunci: An la'anci jami'ai na Urushalima masu lalacewa, annabawa na ƙarya, da firistoci saboda cin zarafinsu da koyarwa ta ƙarya (3:1–5)
An yi alkawarin harshe mai tsabta: Jehobah zai ba dukan al'ummomi 'harshe mai tsabta' don su kira sunansa tare — annabci da ya riga ya ga cika (3:9)
Jehobah yana murna a kan mutanensa: 'Jehobah Allahnka yana tare da ku... zai yi murna a kanku da babban farin ciki... zai yi farin ciki a kanku da waƙar farin ciki' (3:17)
An tara su daga al'ummai: Jehobah zai tara guragu, waɗanda aka ƙi, da waɗanda aka zalunta daga dukan al'ummai ya kuma ba su yabo da daraja (3:18–20)
Aikin ya tsaya: Shekara goma sha shida bayan komawa daga zaman bauta, mutane sun gina nasu gidaje masu kyau yayin da Haikalin Jehobah yake cikin kufai (1:1–6)
Ku yi tunani game da hanyoyinku: Jehobah yana neman mutane su yi tunani me ya sa ƙoƙarinsu ba sa kawo gamsuwa mai dorewa — fifikon ruhaniya bai dace ba (1:5–11)
Biyayya nan da nan: 'Jehobah ya tayar da ruhun' shugabanni da mutane; cikin kwanaki 24 sun fara aiki (1:12–15)
An yi alkawarin ɗaukaka mafi girma: Ko da yake Haikalin da aka sake gina ya kasance mara kima idan aka kwatanta da na Sulemanu, ɗaukakarsa ta gaba za ta fi girma (2:1–9)
Tsarki da tsabta: Misali game da yadda ƙazanta tana yaɗuwa cikin sauƙi fiye da tsarki yana gargaɗi game da gurɓataccen ruhaniya (2:10–19)
Zerubabel a matsayin zoben hatimi: Alkawarin Jehobah ga Zerubabel yana nuna cika a nan gaba a zuriyar Almasihu (2:20–23)
Wahayoyi takwas na dare: Jerin wahayoyi (mahaya, ƙahoni, mai auna, fitilar, naɗaɗɗen littafi, mace cikin efa, kekunan yaƙi) sun ƙarfafa masu komawa kuma sun bayyana nufin Jehobah (1–6)
Joshuwa babban firist: Shaiɗan yana zargi Joshuwa; Jehobah ya tsawatar wa Shaiɗan kuma ya tufatar da Joshuwa cikin tufafin tsabta — yana nuna gafara ta Kristi (3)
Ba ta ƙarfi ba: 'Ba ta wurin runduna ba, ba kuma ta wurin iko ba, amma ta wurin ruhuna, in ji Jehobah na rundunoni' — aikin zai yi nasara ta ƙarfin Jehobah (4:6)
Sarki mai nasara ya shiga Urushalima: 'Sarkinki yana zuwa gare ki... mai tawali'u kuma yana hawa kan jaki' — Yesu ya cika daidai a shigarsa ta ƙarshe (9:9; Matiyu 21:5)
An ci amana don tsabar azurfa 30: Farashin makiyayin da aka ƙi — an jefa wa mai yin tukunya a haikalin — daidai ya yi annabcin cin amanar Yahuza (11:12–13; Matiyu 27:9–10)
Za su dubi wanda suka soka: 'Za su dubi wanda suka soka kuma su yi kuka a kansa' — an cika a Kalfari da kuma a dawowar Kristi (12:10; Yohanna 19:37; Ru'ya ta Yohanna 1:7)
Ƙalubalen Jehobah 'Yaya kuka ƙaunace mu?': An fallasa rashin kulawar ruhaniya na mutane yayin da Jehobah yana nuni ga zaɓin Yakubu a kan Isuwa (1:2–5)
Hadayu marasa darajar zuci: Firistoci suna ba da dabbobi makafi, guragu, da marasa lafiya — abin da ba za su kuskura ba su ba wani gwamna na mutum ba (1:6–14)
Firistoci masu lalata: Maimakon su jagoranci mutane a hanyoyin Jehobah, firistoci sun sa da yawa su yi tuntuɓe (2:1–9)
Sakin aure mai ha'inci: Jehobah ya bayyana 'na ƙi sakin aure' — ra'ayinsa na amincin alkawari ya kai ga dangantakar aure (2:13–16)
Manzo da mai tsarkakewa: Manzo zai shirya hanya a gaban Jehobah, kuma Jehobah da kansa zai zo nan da nan ga haikalinsa don tsarkake Lawiyawa (3:1–4)
Littafin tunawa: Jehobah yana ba da kulawa ta musamman ga waɗanda suke tsoronsa kuma suke magana tare game da sunansa, yana rubuta sunayensu a littafi (3:16–18)
Tsararraki da haihuwar Yesu: Matiyu ya bude da gano zuriyar sarauta ta Yesu ta wurin Dauda da Ibrahim, yana cika sharuɗɗan Almasihu (1–2)
Baftisma da gwaji: An yi baftismar Yesu ta hannun Yohanna, Jehobah ya yarda da shi a matsayin Ɗansa, sannan ya yi nasara a kan gwaje-gwaje uku na Shaiɗan ta wurin Nassi (3–4)
Wa'azi a Dutse: Yesu ya gabatar da ƙimomi, ayyuka, da fifikon 'yan ƙasar Mulki a cikin koyarwar ɗabi'a mafi cikakke a cikin Nassi (5–7)
Misalan Mulki: Misalai bakwai na mai shuka, ciyawa, mustard, yeast, dukiya, lu'u-lu'u, da raga sun bayyana ci gaba da hukuncin Mulki (13)
Alamomin kasancewar Kristi: Cikakkun amsar Yesu game da alamar kasancewarsa a kwanakin ƙarshe ta ba da tsari na haɗaka don gano lokaci (24–25)
Mutuwa, binnewa, da tashin matattu: Shari'a, mutuwa, da tashin Yesu sun tabbatar da ainihinsa a matsayin Sarkin da Jehobah ya naɗa (26–28)
Hidima ta sauri: Yin amfani da Markus na 'nan da nan' (kusan sau 40) yana ɗaukar saurin hidimar Yesu ta Galili (1–9)
Iko a kan aljanu: Yesu yana fitar da aljanu da kalma — ga ban mamaki na taron jama'a waɗanda suka saba kawai da koyarwa marar iko na marubuta (1:21–28; 5:1–20)
Mu'ujizai na tausayi: Warkar da mai kuturta (1:40–45), tashin 'yar Yairus (5:35–43), da maido da hangen Bartimaiyas (10:46–52) sun bayyana zuciyar Yesu
Furucin Bitrus a Kaisariya Filibi: 'Kai ne Kristi' — juyi mai mahimmanci bayan haka Yesu ya fara koyarwa game da mutuwarsa mai zuwa (8:27–9:1)
Jagorancin bauta: Yesu yana koyarwa cewa 'duk wanda yake so ya zama na farko dole ya zama bawa ga kowa' kai tsaye yana ƙalubalantar girman kai na almajirai (10:35–45)
Magana a Dutsen Zaitun: Annabcin Yesu a Dutsen Zaitun ya rufe halakar Urushalima da alamar haɗaka ta zuwansa (13)
Labaran haihuwa: Luka kaɗai ya rubuta sanarwar mala'iku ga Maryamu, labarin makiyaya, da gabatar a haikalin (1–2)
Tsararraki ta wurin Maryamu: Luka ya gano zuriyar mutum ta Yesu ta wurin Maryamu zuwa Adamu — yana haɗa shi da dukan ɗan adam (3:23–38)
Misalin ɗan ɓarawo: Maraba mai farin ciki na uba ga ɗan da ya tuba shine hoton zuciyar Jehobah mafi tsabta ga masu zunubi masu tuba a dukan bishara huɗu (15:11–32)
Basamariye mai kyau: Ma'anar 'maƙwabci' ta wuce dukan iyakokin ƙabilanci, tana kafa ƙauna ga kowane mutum mai bukata a matsayin nauyin Kirista (10:25–37)
Mata a hidimar Yesu: Luka kaɗai ya ambata yawancin matan da suka bi kuma suka tallafa wa hidimar Yesu — yana nuna mutuncin da ya basu (8:1–3; 23:49, 55)
Hanya zuwa Imawus: Yesu mai tashi yana bayyana dukan Nassosin Ibrananci masu alaƙa da kansa — abin koyi don koyarwa bisa Littafi Mai Tsarki (24:13–35)
Gabatarwa: 'A farko Kalma ne... Kalma yana tare da Allah' — Yesu a matsayin mai magana na musamman na Jehobah na kafin mutum da wakili na halittu (1:1–18)

Alamomi bakwai na mu'ujiza: Ruwa zuwa ruwan inabi, warkar da ɗan jami'i, warkar da kumamen, ciyar da 5,000, tafiya a kan ruwa, warkar da makaho, tashin Li'azaru — kowane yana bayyana ikon Yesu na allahntaka (2–11)

Magana bakwai na 'Ni ne': Gurasar rai, hasken duniya, ƙofa, makiyayi mai kyau, tashin matattu, hanya/gaskiya/rai, magaryar gaskiya — kowane yana bayyana matsayin Yesu a matsayin tashar albarka ta Jehobah (6; 8; 10; 11; 14; 15)
Magana a ɗakin sama: Koyarwar Yesu mafi tsayi a sirri — ta'aziyya ga almajirai, mai taimaka da aka yi alkawari (ruhu mai tsarki), misalin magaryar gaskiya (14–16)
Addu'ar babban firist: Yesu yana yin addu'a don kariyar almajiransa, haɗin kai, da tsarkakewa cikin gaskiya — ciki har da 'don su san ka, Allah na gaskiya kaɗai' (17)
Furucin Toma: 'Ubangijina da Allahna!' — yana yarda da nadin Yesu na allahntaka ba tare da kwatanta shi da Jehobah ba (20:28)
Fentakos da ruhu mai tsarki: Ruhu ya sauka da harsunan wuta; Bitrus ya bayyana shi a matsayin cikar Joel 2:28–32; an yi baftisma 3,000 a rana ɗaya (2)
Ikilisiya ta farko a Urushalima: Raba kayan aiki, tarurruka na yau da kullum, alamomin mu'ujiza — tsarin bauta na al'umma na cikakken zuciya (2:42–47; 4:32–35)
Jawabin Istifanus da mutuwarsa: Mafi tsayin jawabi a Ayyukan Manzanni ya ba da labarin tarihin Isra'ila; mutuwar Istifanus ta sa Shawulu ya zama shaida ga shahidi na farko na Kristanci (7)
Filibus da Ba'etiyofiya: Wani jami'in fada da yake nazarin Ishaya 53 an yi masa baftisma — bishara ta isa Afirka (8:26–40)
Tubar Bulus: Mai tsanantawa Shawulu ya gamu da Yesu mai tashi a hanyar Damaskus kuma ya zama mishaneri mafi girma a tarihi (9)
Majalisar Urushalima: Rikicin koyarwa na farko mai mahimmanci — ko al'umman waje suna bukatar kaciya — an warware shi ta hannun hukumar mulki a ƙarƙashin jagorancin ruhu mai tsarki (15)
Zunubin duniya: Duka al'umman waje (sura 1–2) da Yahudawa (sura 2–3) sun gaza — duka suna bukatar fansa (3:9–20, 23)
Adalci ta wurin imani: An lasafta Ibrahim da adalci ta wurin imani kafin kaciya — yana nuna cewa imani, ba doka ba, shine tushen (4)
Adamu da Kristi bambanta: Mutum ɗaya ya kawo zunubi da mutuwa; aikin adalci na mutum ɗaya ya kawo rayuwa mai adalci (5:12–21)
Gwagwarmaya da zunubi: Bayanin Bulus mai motsa rai na yaƙin ciki da halayen zunubi ya tabbatar wa masu bi cewa gwagwarmaya na al'ada ce (7:14–25)
Rayuwa cikin ruhu: Babu hukunci ga waɗanda ke cikin Kristi; ruhu kanta yana shaida cewa su 'ya'yan Jehobah ne; babu abin da zai iya raba su daga ƙaunarsa (8)
Makomar Isra'ila: Surori 9–11 sun magance ko Jehobah ya ƙi Isra'ila — a'a; an zaɓi ragowa, kuma haɗawar al'umman waje ya tsokane Isra'ila ta dabi'a (11:25–32)
Rabe-rabe a ikilisiya: An tsawata wa ƙungiyoyi da ke kafa kewayen Bulus, Afolos, da Bitrus — Kristi kaɗai shi ne tushen haɗin kai (1–4)
An jure fasikanci: Ba a horar da batun lalata da iyali a ikilisiya ba; Bulus ya nace a kan korarwa (5)
Aure da rashin aure: Bulus ya magance dangantakar jima'i, aure, sakin aure, da fa'idodin ci gaba da kasancewa ba a aure don hidima ta cikakkiyar lokaci (7)
Rufe kai da Cin Abincin Maraice na Ubangiji: Umarni don halayya mai dacewa a tarurrukan ikilisiya, ciki har da sa hannu da darajar cikin Tunawa (11)
Kyaututtukan ruhaniya: Dukan kyaututtuka suna fitowa ne daga ruhu ɗaya kuma suna hidima ga jiki ɗaya; ƙauna (sura 13) ta fi dukan kyaututtuka tare (12–14)
Tashin matattu: Kariya mai tsawo na tashin matattu na jiki, yana bayyana tabbacinsa, yanayinsa, da tsari — tushen dukan begen Kirista (15)
Ta'aziyya ta Bulus cikin azaba: Tsarin 'kamar yadda wahalhalu na Kristi suka yawaita a cikinmu, haka ta'aziyya... ta yawaita' yana sake fasalin dukan shan wahala a matsayin manufa (1:3–11)
Hidimar sabon alkawari: Bulus ya bambanta ɗaukakar tsohon alkawari (mai shuɗewa) da ɗaukakar sabon (mai dawwama) (3)
Dukiya a tulun yumɓu: Yawancin wahalhalu na Bulus da aka lissafa sun tabbatar cewa iko yana fitowa daga Jehobah, ba daga ƙarfin mutum ba (4:7–12)
Tarawa don Urushalima: An nuna karimci ta ikilisiyoyin Makidoniya; 'Jehobah yana ƙaunar mai bayarwa da farin ciki' (8–9)
Wahayoyi na Bulus da ƙayar a jiki: 'Ƙaya' ya sa Bulus ya zama mai tawali'u; amsar Jehobah: 'Ikona ana cika shi a rashin ƙarfi' (12)
Kariyar manzancin Bulus: Bulus yana kare amincinsa a kan 'manzanni masu kima', yana lissafa wahalhalunsa a matsayin wasiƙun shaida na gaskiya (11–12)
An kare bishara ta gaskiya: Bulus ya tunkari Yahudancin da suka ƙara kaciya ga fansa a matsayin sharaɗi; ya kira kowace bishara dabam la'antacciya (1)
Bulus ya tunkari Bitrus: A Antakiya, an ƙalubalanci munafuncin Bitrus na rabuwa da masu bi al'umman waje a sarari — gaskiyar koyarwa ba ta sasantawa (2:11–21)
Doka a matsayin malami: Dokar Musa ta yi hidima a matsayin 'malami da ke kai zuwa Kristi'; yanzu da imani ya zo, Kiristoci ba sa ƙarƙashin malami (3:24–25)
Ɗiyan Allah ta wurin imani: 'Ba Bayahude ba Bahaushe, ba bawa ba ɗan'yanci, ba namiji ba mace; duka ku ɗaya ne cikin Kristi Yesu' — haɗin kai na duka a gaban Jehobah (3:28)
Sakamakon ruhu: Ƙauna, farin ciki, salama, haƙuri, kirki, alheri, imani, tausasawa, kamewa — halayen da ruhu yake samarwa sabanin ayyukan jiki (5:22–23)
Shuka da girbi: Doka da ba za a iya tsallakewa na duniyar Jehobah — 'duk abin da mutum yake shukawa, shi ne zai girba' (6:7–9)
Albarkun ruhaniya a wuraren sama: Jehobah ya zaɓi kuma ya tsara Kiristoci shafaffu kafin lokaci a matsayin 'ya'yansa da aka karɓe, don yabon ɗaukakarsa (1)
Matacce cikin zunubi, mai rai cikin Kristi: An cece su ba ta wurin cancanta ba amma kawai ta wurin alherin Jehobah ta wurin imani — babu wuri don fariyar mutum (2:1–10)
An bayyana sirri: Al'umman waje da Yahudawa an haɗa su zama sabon mutum ɗaya ta wurin Kristi — sirri da aka ɓoye a zamani da suka gabata yanzu an bayyana ta ikilisiya (2:11–3:12)
Yi tafiya da daraja na kira: Haɗin kai, tawali'u, kar a sake tafiya cikin banza kamar yadda al'ummomi suke yi — dole halayya ta dace da kira (4)
Saka sabon hali: Matakai masu amfani — kar ka yi ƙarya, fushi, sata, magana mai lalata, ɗaci — su maye gurbinsu da halaye masu kama da na Allah (4:22–5:2)
Makaman ruhaniya: Cikakkun makamai — bel na gaskiya, sulken adalci, takalmin bishara, garkuwar imani, hular ceto, takobin ruhu (6:10–18)
Abokai cikin bishara: Godiyar Bulus ga goyon bayan Filibiyawa na zahiri da addu'arsa don ci gaba da haɓakar su a ƙauna da fahimta (1:1–11)
Ɗaurin Bulus yana ciyar da bishara: Ko da kurkuku ya yi hidima don yaɗa bishara; Bulus yana fuskantar mutuwa ko rayuwa da salama (1:12–26)
Tawali'un Kristi a matsayin abin koyi: Daga sifa ta allahntaka zuwa bautar mutum zuwa mutuwa a kan gungumen azaba — tsarin 'wofintar da kai' da dukan Kiristoci dole su yi koyi (2:5–11)
Kyautar kira na sama: Bulus yana matsa zuwa burin, yana mantawa abin da ke baya, yana miƙawa gaba — yana yin tsere da manufa (3:12–16)
Salama ta wurin addu'a: 'Kada ku damu da komai, amma... bari a sanar da bukatunku ga Allah; salamar Allah da ta wuce dukan fahimta' (4:6–7)
Yi tunani game da abubuwa masu kyau: Jerin kyakkyawa — gaskiya, adalci, tsabta, ƙauna, abubuwa masu kyau — yana mulkin abincin tunani na Kirista (4:8)
Fifikon Kristi: 'Shi ne hoton Allah marar ganuwa, ɗan fari na kowane halitta... duk wasu abubuwa an halicce su ta wurinsa' (1:15–17)
Cikakken sasantawa: Ta wurin mutuwar Kristi, waɗanda a dā suka kasance baƙi da abokan gaba yanzu sun sasanta da Jehobah (1:19–23)
Gargaɗi a kan falsafa: 'Ku mai da hankali don kada wani ya kama ku da falsafa da yaudara mara kome' na al'adar mutum sabanin koyarwar Kristi (2:8)
An tashe tare da Kristi: Sabuwar rayuwa tana ɓoye tare da Kristi a cikin Jehobah; masu bi su 'ci gaba da neman abubuwa na sama' (3:1–4)
Sabon hali: Cikakkun jerin abubuwan tsoho da za a tuɓe (fasikanci, fushi, ƙarya) da sabbin abubuwan da za a sa (tausayi, alheri, gafara, ƙauna) (3:5–17)
Aiki ga Jehobah: 'Duk abin da kuke yi, ku yi shi da dukan rai kamar ga Jehobah ba ga mutane ba' — yana canza aikin yau da kullum zuwa bauta (3:23–24)
Misalin imani: Tasalonikawa sun zama misalai ga dukan Makidoniya — imaninsu ya yaɗu yayin da labarin tubarsu ya isa ko'ina (1:6–10)
Kulawar iyaye ta Bulus: Bulus ya bayyana hidimarsa a tsakaninsu a matsayin uwa mai shayarwa da uba mai ƙarfafawa — ƙaunar makiyayi ta gaskiya (2:7–12)
Rahoton Timothawus ya kawo ta'aziyya: Labarin Timothawus mai ƙarfafawa game da imanin ikilisiya ya ɗauki Bulus a cikin nasa wahalhalu (3)
Tsabtar jima'i: Cikakken umarni cewa nufin Jehobah shine tsarkakewa — 'mallaki nasa jiki cikin tsarki da daraja, ba cikin sha'awar jima'i ba' (4:3–8)

Begen tashin matattu ga matattu: 'Waɗanda suke matattu cikin Kristi za su tashi tukuna' — cikakken bayanin kasancewar Kristi yana ta'azantar da waɗanda suke jin tsoro ga ƙaunatattu da suka mutu (4:13–18)
