Yaya 'masu ta'aziyya' na Ayuba suka kasa shi, kuma menene wannan ke koyarwa game da yadda ake tallafa wa wadanda suke fuskantar gwaji da gaske?
Menene amsar Jehobah ga Ayuba daga gusguzu (sura 38–41) yake bayyana game da hikima da ikon Jehobah idan aka kwatanta da fahimtar dan adam?
Yaya Ayuba ya ci gaba da amincinsa a karkashin gwaji mai tsanani, kuma menene misalinsa ke koyarwa game da jurewa wahala ba ta gaskiya da aminci?
Menene cikakkiyar maidowar Ayuba (sura 42) yake koyarwa game da kulawar Jehobah ga wadanda suka kiyaye amincinsu, kuma yaya wannan yake nuni gaba ga fata na tashin matattu?
Yaya Zaburar makoki (kamar Zabura 22, 42, 88) suke koyarmu mu kasance da gaskiya tare da Jehobah game da abubuwan da muke ji a lokacin wahala?
Menene Zabura 83:18 take koyarwa game da muhimmancin sunan Jehobah, kuma yaya wannan yake motsa Shaidun Jehobah a hidimarsu?
Yaya Zaburar mulki (kamar Zabura 93, 96–99) suke ba da gudummawa ga fahimtar mu game da Mulkin Jehobah da hakkinsa na mulki?
Menene Zabura 119 — Zabura mafi tsayi — take koyarwa game da halin da ya dace da ya kamata mu kasance da shi ga shari'a da kalmar Jehobah?
Yaya Zaburar Almasihu (kamar Zabura 2, 22, 110) suke yin alama da Yesu Kristi, kuma wadanne abubuwa ne aka cika musamman?
Menene Karin Magana 1:7 — 'Tsoron Jehobah shi ne farkon hikima' — yake nufi, kuma yaya tsoron Jehobah daidai yake jagorantar yanke shawara na yau da kullum?
Yaya Karin Magana 3:5–6 — 'Ka dogara ga Jehobah da dukan zuciyarka' — yake aiki da gaske lokacin yanke manyan shawarwarin rayuwa?
Wane gargadi Karin Magana ke bayarwa game da hadarin abota mara kyau, kuma yaya wadannan suka shafi Shaidun Jehobah wajen zabar abokai?
Yaya bayanin 'mata mai iyawa' a Karin Magana 31 yake nuna halayen da Jehobah yake kimar a dukan bayinsa?
Wace jagora ta aiki ce Karin Magana ke bayarwa game da amfani da harshe, kuma yaya za mu iya amfani da wannan hikima kullum?
Menene karshen Sulemanu cewa dukan kokari 'wofi' ne yake koyarwa game da hadarin neman gamsuwa mai dawwama waje da Jehobah?
Yaya Mai-Wa'azi 3:1–8 — 'lokaci na kowane manufa a karkashin sama' — ke taimaka wa Shaidun Jehobah su kiyaye daidaito a ayyukan rayuwa?
Menene Mai-Wa'azi ke koyarwa game da mutuwa da yanayin matattu (9:5, 10) wanda yake goyon bayan koyarwar Littafi Mai Tsarki game da fata na tashin matattu?
Yaya Mai-Wa'azi 12:1 — 'Ka tuna da Mahaliccinka a kwanaki na kuruciyarka' — yake motsa matasa su sadaukar da kansu ga Jehobah da wuri a rayuwa?
Menene karshen Mai-Wa'azi (12:13–14) — ji tsoron Jehobah da kiyaye umarnansa — yake koyarwa game da manufar dan adam ta gaskiya?
Menene Wakar Sulemanu take koyarwa game da muhimmancin da Jehobah yake bayarwa ga kauna, aminci, da sadaukarwa cikin aure?
Yaya yabon junansu da sadarwa a bude da aka kwatanta a Wakar suke yin abin koyi na halayen da ke karfafa kowace dangantaka ta kusa?
Menene 'kauna mai karfi kamar mutuwa' (8:6) yake koyarwa game da yanayin amincin gaskiya da sadaukarwa cikin dangantaka?
Yaya hattara da amincin Shulamita ga makiyayinta suke kwatanta halayen sadaukar da Jehobah yake kimar?
Wace ka'idar Wakar Sulemanu take taimaka wa Shaidun Jehobah wajen kiyaye dangantaka masu lafiya, masu daraja?
Yaya Ishaya 9:6–7 ke bayyana Sarki Almasihu mai zuwa, kuma yaya aka cika wadannan halaye a Yesu Kristi?
Menene Ishaya 40:28–31 yake koyarwa game da karfin Jehobah marar gajiya da kulawarsa ga wadanda suka gaji?
Yaya 'Wakokin Bawa' guda hudu a Ishaya (42:1–4; 49:1–6; 50:4–9; 52:13–53:12) suke bayyana wahalar Almasihu da hidimarsa?
Menene Ishaya 65:17–25 yake bayyana game da sabuwar duniya mai zuwa, kuma yaya wannan hangen nesa ke tallafa wa fatar mutanen Jehobah?
Yaya amsar Ishaya ga wahayinsa a sura 6 — 'Aiko ni!' — ya nuna ruhin shirye da Shaidun Jehobah suke nunawa a hidimarsu?
Menene Irmiya 1:5 — 'Kafin in tsara ka cikin ciki na san ka' — yake koyarwa game da sanin Jehobah da manufa ga kowane mutum?
Yaya Irmiya ya kasance amintacce duk da tsananin tsanantawa, ba'a, da wani lokaci yanke kauna, kuma menene za mu iya koya daga misalinsa?
Menene alkawarin Jehobah na sabon alkawari (Irmiya 31:31–34) yake koyarwa game da fifikon tsarin da Yesu ya yi tsaka-tsaki?
Yaya wasikar Irmiya ga masu zaman bauta a Babila (sura 29) — gaya musu su nemi salamar birni — ta yi amfani da ka'idar zama 'ba na duniya ba'?
Menene sayan filin Irmiya (sura 32) ko da Urushalima yana faduwa yake koyarwa game da amincewa da alkawuran Jehobah na nan gaba?
Yaya littafin Makoki yake yin abin koyi na bakin ciki na gaskiya yayin da yake kiyaye fata cikin loyal love na Jehobah?
Menene Makoki 3:22–23 — loyal love na Jehobah 'ba ya karewa' da 'ana sabunta jinkai kowace safiya' — yake koyarwa game da amincin Jehobah madawwami?
Yaya bakin cikin Irmiya kan rugujewar Urushalima yake nuna yadda bayin Jehobah a yau ya kamata su ji game da mugunta a duniya?
Menene Makoki yake koyarwa game da sakamako na barin ma'aunin Jehobah, kuma yaya wannan ke zama gargadi gare mu?
Yaya yarda da masu zaman bauta a Makoki 3:40 — 'Bari mu bincika kuma mu duba hanyoyinmu' — ta nuna amsa daidai ga horon Jehobah?
Menene wahayoyin farko na Ezekiyel (sura 1–3) na kursiyin keken Jehobah suke koyarwa game da girman Jehobah da aikin ruhunsa mai tsarki?
Yaya rawar Ezekiyel a matsayin 'mai gadi' (sura 3, 33) yake daidaita da nauyin Shaidun Jehobah na fadakar da wasu game da hukuncin Jehobah?
Menene Ezekiyel 18:23 — 'Ba na jin dadin mutuwar mugu' — yake koyarwa game da sha'awar Jehobah ga duka su tuba su rayu?
Yaya wahayin kwarin kasusuwa busassu (sura 37) ke yi alama da tashin matattu a karkashin Mulkin Jehobah?
Menene wahayin Ezekiyel na Haikalin nan gaba (sura 40–48) yake koyarwa game da muhimmancin bauta mai tsabta, mai tsari ga Jehobah?
Yaya Daniyel da abokansa uku (sura 1–6) suka nuna cewa yana yiwuwa a kiyaye amincin karkashin matsi mai tsanani daga karfin duniya mai kiyayya?
Menene Daniyel 2:44 — Jehobah ya kafa mulki da ba za a hallaka ba — yake koyarwa game da tabbacin Mulkin Jehobah?
Yaya labarin Shadrak, Mishak, da Abednago (sura 3) ya zama misalin bangaskiya na 'ko ba haka ba' wanda Shaidun Jehobah za su iya bukata yayin tsanantawa?
Menene annabcin Lokutan Al'ummai (Daniyel 4) da babban siffa a Daniyel 2 suke bayyana game da maye-mayen karfin duniya da jadawalin Jehobah?
Yaya dabi'ar addu'a ta Daniyel — yin addu'a sau uku a yini ba tare da la'akari da dokar sarauta ba (sura 6) — take koyarwa game da muhimmancin bauta ta yau da kullum?
Yaya Jehobah ya yi amfani da auren Hosea a matsayin kwatanci mai rai na rashin amincin Isra'ila na ruhi, kuma yaya wannan yake taimaka mana fahimtar tsananin zinar ruhi?
Menene Hosea 6:6 — 'Ina son loyal love, ba hadaya ba; kuma sanin Allah maimakon cikakkun hadayoyin konawa' — yake koyarwa game da abin da Jehobah ya fi kimar?
Yaya ci gaba da jinkai da gayyatar Jehobah na Isra'ila ta dawo (sura 14) suke nuna zurfin loyal love nasa da iyawar gafara?
Menene Hosea yake koyarwa game da hadarin ruhi na hada bauta ta gaskiya da ayyukan addini na al'umman da ke kewaye?
Yaya annabcin Hosea (13:14) game da fansar daga ikon kabari yake hadawa da maganganun Bulus a 1 Korintiyawa 15:55?
Yaya Yowel ya yi amfani da annobar barauniya a matsayin kira ga tuba ta gaskiya, kuma menene 'tsaga zuciyarku, ba tufafinku ba' (2:13) yake nufi ga bauta a yau?
Menene annabcin Yowel game da Jehobah yana zuba ruhunsa (2:28–29) yake koyarwa, musamman kamar yadda aka cika a Fentekos 33 AZ (Ayyukan Manzanni 2:1–21)?
Yaya 'ranar Jehobah' a Yowel yake kwatanta da abin da Ru'ya ta Yohanna ta bayyana game da babbar wahala da Armagedon?
Menene annabcin Yowel game da al'ummai a yi musu hukunci a 'Kwarin Yanke Shawara' (3:14) yake koyarwa game da hukuncin Jehobah mai zuwa?
Menene alkawarin Yowel na maidowa (2:18–27; 3:17–18) yake koyarwa game da albarkar da Jehobah ya tanada wa wadanda suka koma gareshi?
Menene Amos 3:7 — 'Hakika, Mai-Iko Duka Jehobah ba ya yin kome ba tare da bayyana al'amarinsa na sirri ga bayinsa annabawa ba' — yake koyarwa game da sadarwar Jehobah da mutanensa?
Yaya zargin Amos na bauta marar zuciya (sura 5–6) ya shafi hadarin yin ayyukan bauta ba tare da gaskiya ba?
Menene Amos yake koyarwa game da damuwar Jehobah ga adalci na zamantakewa da magance matalauta, kuma yaya wannan ke nuna kimar Jehobah?
Menene hukunce-hukuncen al'ummomi masu kewaye (sura 1–2) suke koyarwa game da Jehobah yana rike dukan mutane — ba kawai Isra'ila ba — masu lissafi ga ma'auni na dabi'a?
Yaya annabcin Amos game da 'tantin Dauda da ya fadi' (9:11) yake hadawa da maidowar bauta mai tsabta da Mulkin Jehobah?
Wane zunubai musamman na Edom suka kai ga hukuncin Jehobah, kuma menene suke koyarwa game da hadarin girman kai da dogaro da kai?
Yaya farin cikin Edom a kan faduwar Urushalima (ayoyi 12–14) ya saba wa ka'idar kaunar 'yan'uwa, kuma wane gargadi wannan yake rikewa gare mu?
Menene Obadiya yake koyarwa game da ka'idar 'kamar yadda ka aikata, haka za a aikata maka' (aya ta 15)?
Yaya cikakken hukuncin Jehobah a kan Edom — al'umma da ta kasance kamar ba ta iya cin nasara ba — ya nuna cewa babu makircin dan adam da zai iya tsayawa kan nufin Jehobah?
Menene aya ta karshe na Obadiya — 'Mulkin zai zama na Jehobah' — yake hangen game da nan gaba a karkashin Mulkin Jehobah?
Menene kuskuren kin Yunusa na farko na zuwa Nineba, kuma yaya wannan ke kalubalantar mu mu yi tunani game da halinmu wajen raba bishara da kowane irin mutane?
Yaya sarrafa Jehobah na hali da hakuri ga Yunusa — daga kifi zuwa kuringar bishi — ya nuna sha'awarsa ta koyar maimakon hukuntawa kawai?
Menene tuban gaskiya na Nineba da yanke shawarar Jehobah na rashin kawo barna (3:10) yake koyarwa game da tasirin tuba ta zuciya?
Yaya addu'ar Yunusa daga cikin kifi (sura 2) ya yi abin koyi na addu'a ta gaskiya, ta kai ga Jehobah har a yanayi mafi rashin bege?
Menene labarin Yunusa yake koyarwa game da sha'awar Jehobah a walwalar ruhi ta dukan mutane, yana hangen aikin wa'azi na duniya?
Yaya Mika 5:2 — yana yi annabcin haihuwar Almasihu a Baitalami — yake nuna amincin annabcin Jehobah lokacin da aka cika a haihuwar Yesu?
Menene Mika 6:8 — 'yin adalci, kaunar aminci, kuma tafiya cikin tawali'u tare da Allahnka' — yake gano a matsayin halayen muhimmi da Jehobah ke bukata?
Yaya bayanin Mika na kwanaki na karshe (4:1–4) — lokacin da mutane ke gudu zuwa 'dutsen' Jehobah don koyarwa — yake bayyana abin da ke faruwa da Shaidun Jehobah a yau?
Menene Mika yake koyarwa game da bambanci tsakanin jagoranci mai cin hanci (sura 3) da jagoranci mai adalci da Jehobah ke kimar?
Yaya Mika 7:18–20 yake bayyana halayen Jehobah na gafara da loyal love a hanyar da ke ba da ta'aziyya ga wadanda suka yi kuskure?
Wane halaye na Jehobah ne Nahum 1:2–7 yake bayyana — kishinsa, jinkirin fushi, da girmansa — kuma yaya suke aiki tare?
Menene faduwar Nineba take koyarwa game da yadda har karfin mafi karfi na dan adam suke a karshe karkashin hukuncin Jehobah?
Yaya Nahum 1:7 — 'Jehobah nagari ne, kagara a ranar damuwa; kuma yana sane da wadanda ke neman mafaka a gare shi' — ke ba da ta'aziyya yayin lokuta masu wahala?
Yaya bambancin tsakanin yadda Jehobah ya tafiyar Nineba a Yunusa (jinkai bisa tuba) da Nahum (hukunci don komawa ga mugunta) yake koyarwa game da iyakokin hakurin Jehobah?
Wace ka'ida game da adalcin Jehobah — cewa ba zai bar masu laifi su tafi ba — muke gani an nuna a faduwar Nineba?
Yaya shirin Habakkuk na tambayar Jehobah da gaske game da rashin adalci bayyananne (sura 1–2) yake nuna cewa za mu iya kawo damuwarmu mafi zurfi ga Jehobah a addu'a?
Menene Habakkuk 2:4 — 'mai adalci zai rayu ta amincinsa' — yake nufi, kuma yaya Bulus ya yi amfani da wannan aya a Romawa da Galatiyawa?
Yaya amsar Jehobah — cewa yana daga Babila a matsayin kayan aikinsa — ta kalubalantar fahimtar Habakkuk, kuma menene wannan ke koyarwa game da dogara ga hikimar Jehobah?
Menene Habakkuk 3:17–18 — yin farin ciki cikin Jehobah ko da dukan albarkar dabi'a sun kasa — yake yi a matsayin misali game da kiyaye farin ciki ta kowane yanayi?
Yaya tafiyar Habakkuk daga koke zuwa yabo take yin abin koyi na tsari mai lafiya na ruhi ga Shaidun Jehobah wadanda suke kokawa da tambayoyi masu wuya?
Yaya bayanin Zafaniya na 'ranar Jehobah' a matsayin mai bandaki da mai fata yake shirya Shaidun Jehobah don babbar wahala mai zuwa?
Menene Zafaniya 3:17 — 'Jehobah Allahnku yana cikinku... Zai yi farin ciki a kanku da babban farin ciki' — yake bayyana game da yadda Jehobah ke ji game da mutanensa?
Menene kiran Zafaniya na 'nemi Jehobah, dukanku masu tawali'u na duniya' (2:3) ke nufi a hanyar aiki ga rayuwarmu ta yau da kullum?
Yaya annabcin Zafaniya kan al'ummomi (sura 2) yake nuna ikon dabi'a na Jehobah a kan dukan mutanen duniya?
Menene alkawarin Zafaniya na 'harshe mai tsabta' (3:9) — cewa dukan mutane za su kira sunan Jehobah — yake hangen game da maidowar bauta mai tsabta?
Menene matsalar ruhi da Haggai ya gano lokacin da mutane suka ce 'lokaci bai zo ba tukuna na gina gidan Jehobah' (1:2), kuma yaya wannan dalili zai iya bayyana a rayuwarmu?
Yaya Jehobah ya amsa biyayya nan da nan na mutane bayan sakon Haggai (1:12–15), kuma menene wannan ke koyarwa game da lada don biyayya da sauri?
Menene Haggai 2:9 — 'Daukakar wannan gida na karshe za ta fi ta tsohon' — yake koyarwa game da ikon Jehobah na wuce tsammaninmu?
Yaya sakon Haggai game da sa gidan Jehobah a gaba kafin namu yake shafar yadda Shaidun Jehobah suke tsara abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci a yau?
Menene Haggai 2:4 — 'Ka yi karfi... kuma ka yi aiki, gama ina tare da kai' (an maimaita ga Zerubabel, Joshuwa, da mutane) — yake koyarwa game da tabbacin Jehobah ga wadanda suke yin aikinsa?
Yaya wahayin Zakariya na Shaidan yana tunkarar Joshuwa babban firist (sura 3) da tsawatar Jehobah na Shaidan ke ba da amincewa cewa Jehobah ya kare bayinsa?
Menene Zakariya 4:6 — 'Ba ta wurin sojoji, ko ta wurin iko ba, amma ta wurin ruhuna, ya ce Jehobah' — yake koyarwa game da yadda Jehobah ke cika nufinsa?
Yaya Zakariya 9:9 — sarki da aka annabta yana shiga Urushalima yana hawan jaki — yake hadawa da shigar Yesu mai ban mamaki da tabbatar da amincin annabci?
Menene Zakariya 12:10 — 'Za su duba ga wanda suka soka' — yake hangen, kuma yaya Ru'ya ta Yohanna 1:7 ke hada shi da Yesu?
Yaya babban sakon Zakariya — Jehobah zai komo Sihiyona kuma ya zauna a tsakanin mutanensa — yake tallafa fatar Shaidun Jehobah don sabuwar duniya?
Yaya tambayar Jehobah 'Yaya kuka kaunace mu?' (1:2) ta bayyana sake hutu na ruhi da Malakai ya magance, kuma yaya za mu iya kiyaye kanmu daga wannan hali?
Menene zargin Malakai na hadayoyi marasa tsabta (sura 1) yake koyarwa game da ingancin bauta — lokaci, karfi, da hankali — wadda Jehobah ya cancanta?
Menene Malakai 3:10 — 'Kawo dukan zakka... kuma ka gwada ni' — yake koyarwa game da ka'idar sa abubuwan Jehobah a gaba?
Yaya 'littafin tunawa' da aka rubuta wa wadanda suka ji tsoron Jehobah (3:16) ya nuna cewa Jehobah yana lura sosai da wadanda suke da aminci?
Yaya ayoyi na karshe na Malakai — yana yi annabcin Iliya kafin babbar ranar Jehobah — suke hadawa da hidimar shirya ta Yohanna mai Baftisma?
Yaya Wa'azin Yesu a kan Dutsen (sura 5–7) ke gabatar da ma'aunin halaye da darajojin da suke bambanta 'yan kasar Mulkin Jehobah?
Menene addu'ar koyi ta Yesu (Matiyu 6:9–13) yake koyarwa game da abin da ya kamata ya zama na farko a cikin addu'o'inmu — sunan Jehobah, Mulkinsa, da nufinsa?
Yaya almara na Mulkin a Matiyu 13 suke bayyana amsoshi daban-daban ga sakon Mulkin, kuma wace amsa Shaidun Jehobah ke neman noma?
Menene Babbar Manufa na Yesu (28:19–20) — 'ku zama almajirai daga mutanen dukan al'ummai' — yake bayyana game da fa'ida da yanayi na ci gaba na aikin wa'azi?
Yaya gabatar Matiyu na Yesu a matsayin cikar annabcin Nassosin Ibrananci yake karfafa amincewa cikin amincin kalmar Jehobah?
Menene saurin Bishara ta Markus da jaddada ayyukan Yesu masu karfi suke bayyana game da Yesu a matsayin bawan Jehobah?
Yaya Markus 10:45 — 'Dan Mutum ya zo, ba don a yi masa hidima ba, sai don ya yi hidima kuma ya bayar da ransa fansa a maimakon mutane masu yawa' — yake takaita dukan manufar Yesu?
Menene labarin tsabar gwauruwa biyu (Markus 12:41–44) yake koyarwa game da abin da Jehobah ya kimar a ayyukan bauta da bayarwa?
Yaya umarnin Yesu na 'bi ni' (Markus 1:17; 8:34) yake bayyana abin da cikakken almajirci ke bukata ga wadanda suka bauta wa Jehobah a yau?
Menene Markus 8:29 — 'Kai ne Almasihu' — da koyarwa mai biyowa game da Almasihu mai shan wahala yake gaya mana game da gyaran tsammanin da bai dace ba game da nufin Jehobah?
Yaya jaddada Luka na Yesu yana nuna jinkai ga wadanda aka ki, matalauta, da kuma wadanda ba Yahudawa ba yake nuna kaunar Jehobah ta duniya ga dukan mutane?
Menene almara na dan batacce (Luka 15) yake koyarwa game da farin cikin Jehobah lokacin da masu zunubi suka tuba kuma suka koma gareshi?
Yaya labarin Luka na Basamariye Nagari (10:25–37) ke kayyade abin da 'kaunaci makwabcinka' ke nufi, kuma yaya wannan ya shafi Shaidun Jehobah a yau?
Menene Luka 4:18 — sanarwar Yesu na manufarsa — yake koyarwa game da kubutarwar ruhi da Mulkin Jehobah ke kawowa?
Yaya Luka 19:10 — 'Dan Mutum ya zo ya nema kuma ya ceci batattu' — yake motsa Shaidun Jehobah a hidimarsu don isa ga kowane irin mutane?
Yaya Yohanna 1:1 da 1:14 suke bayyana Yesu a matsayin Kalmar (Logos), kuma menene nahawu na Helenanci na Yohanna 1:1 yake bayyana game da yanayin Yesu ga Jehobah?
Menene maganar Yesu 'Uba ya fi ni girma' (Yohanna 14:28) da ayoyi masu alaka suke koyarwa game da dangantakar Jehobah da Yesu?
Yaya 'Ni ne' guda bakwai (gurasar, hasken, makiyayi, tashin matattu, hanya, kuringa, kofa) suke bayyana rawar Yesu a matsayin tashar albarkar Jehobah?
Menene addu'ar Yesu a Yohanna 17 — gami da bukatar almajiransa 'su zama daya kamar yadda muke daya' — yake koyarwa game da hadin kai a ikilisiya?
Yaya koyarwar Yesu game da ruhu mai tsarki a matsayin 'mai taimako' (paraclete) a Yohanna 14–16 ke bayyana rawar ruhun Jehobah wajen jagora da karfafa mutanensa?
Yaya zuban ruhu mai tsarki na Jehobah a Fentekos 33 AZ (sura 2) ya nuna farkon ikilisiyar sabon alkawari, kuma menene sakamako na gaggawa?
Menene tsarin ci gaban ikilisiya na farko a Ayyukan Manzanni — duk da matsananciyar tsanantawa — yake koyarwa game da yanayin marasa tsayawa na nufin Jehobah?
Yaya misalin karfin hali na Bitrus da Bulus a gaban kotuna da majalisai (sura 4–5; 22–26) suka yi abin koyi na halin da Shaidun Jehobah za su iya kasancewa lokacin kare bishara?
Menene Ayyukan Manzanni 17:11 ke fada game da mutanen Biriya, kuma wane hali ne misalin su ke nunawa don karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki na kai?
Yaya fadadawar aikin wa'azi daga Urushalima zuwa Roma (Ayyukan Manzanni 1:8) ya nuna cikar aikin Yesu da yadda ruhun Jehobah ya jagoranci aikin?
Menene bayanin Bulus game da yadda dukan mutane suka 'kasa daukakar Allah' (3:23) da magani ta wurin bangaskiya cikin Yesu yake koyarwa game da me ya sa muke bukatar fansa?
Yaya Romawa 5:12 — 'ta wurin mutum daya zunubi ya shiga duniya kuma mutuwa ta wurin zunubi' — ke bayyana hadin tsakanin zunubin Adamu da yanayin dan adam?
Menene koyarwar Bulus a Romawa 8:28 — 'dukan abubuwa suna aiki tare don alheri ga wadanda suke kaunar Allah' — yake nufi ga Shaidun Jehobah da ke fuskantar gwaji?
Yaya Romawa 12:1–2 — 'ku mika jikkunanku a matsayin hadaya mai rai' kuma 'ku daina samun kirar wannan tsarin' — ke kayyade abin da hidima ta dukan rai ga Jehobah take kama da shi?
Menene koyarwar Bulus game da yarda da hukumomi (Romawa 13:1–7) da iyakokinta (Ayyukan Manzanni 5:29) yake koyarwa game da dangantakar mu da gwamnatocin dan adam?
Menene koyarwar Bulus kan kyaututtuka na ruhi a sura 12–14 yake koyarwa game da amfani da kyaututtuka a ikilisiya, tare da kauna a matsayin halin muhimmi?
Yaya bayanin Bulus na kauna a sura 13 — mai hakuri, mai jinkai, ba mai kishi ba, ba mai neman bukatun kanta ba — yake kalubalantar mu mu duba dangantakar mu a cikin ikilisiya?
Menene cikakken kariyar Bulus na tashin matattu a sura 15 yake koyarwa game da me ya sa fata na tashin matattu yake na tsakiya a imani na Kirista?
Yaya shawarar Bulus kan sasanta sabani tsakanin 'yan'uwa (sura 6) yake nuna muhimmancin kiyaye hadin ikilisiya da rashin bayyana matsaloli a gaban duniya?
Menene umarnin Bulus game da Abincin Maraice na Ubangiji (11:23–26) yake koyarwa game da muhimmancinsa, sa hannu mai dacewa, da yawan da ake yi?
Menene bayanin Bulus na wahalolinsa (sura 4–6; 11) da ci gaba da hidimarsa duk da su yake koyarwa game da samun karfi a cikin Jehobah?
Yaya maganar Bulus 'lokacin da nake rauni, sai na yi karfi' (12:10) ke sake kayyade abin da karfin ruhi ya kasance kamar?
Menene koyarwar Bulus game da 'sabuwar halitta' (5:17) yake nufi ga wadanda suka shiga dangantaka da Jehobah ta wurin Kristi?
Yaya kiran Bulus na bayarwa mai karimci ga tsarkaka (sura 8–9) — gami da 'Jehobah yana kaunar mai bayar da murna' — ya shafi yadda muke kallo gudummawa da bayarwa mai sadaukarwa?
Menene gargadin Bulus game da kasancewa 'da hadin gwiwa ba daidai ba da marasa bi' (6:14) yake nufi a hanyar aiki ga Shaidun Jehobah a abota, aure, da kasuwanci?
Wace 'bishara daban' Yahudawa-Kiristoci suke yadawa (sura 1), kuma me ya sa Bulus ya ce duk wanda yake wa'azi ya 'la'anta'?
Yaya labarin Bulus na tunkarar Bitrus a bayyane (sura 2) ya nuna muhimmancin kare gaskiyar koyarwa har ma da hamayya da fitaccen mutum?
Menene misalin Hagar da Saratu (sura 4) yake koyarwa game da bambanci tsakanin tsohon alkawari da sabon alkawari?
Yaya bayanin Bulus na 'fruita na ruhu' (5:22–23) ke gano halayen da ya kamata su bayyana kowa da yake bauta wa Jehobah?
Menene ka'idar Bulus 'mutum zai girba abin da ya shuka' (6:7) yake koyarwa game da sakamako na dogon zango na zabubbukan mu na yau da kullum?
Menene bayanin Bulus na ikilisiya a matsayin 'jikin Kristi' (sura 1; 4) yake koyarwa game da hadin kai da dogaron membobin ikilisiya?
Yaya Afisawa 2:8–9 — 'an cece ku ta wurin bangaskiya... ba ta wurin ayyuka ba' — ke fayyace tushen fatarmu ta ceto?
Menene kwatancin 'cikakken sutturar makamai na Allah' (6:10–18) yake koyarwa game da yakin ruhi da Shaidun Jehobah ke fuskanta da yadda za su kare kansu?
Yaya shawarar Bulus ga gidajen Kirista — maza, mata, yara, iyaye (sura 5–6) — yake nuna ma'aunin Jehobah na rayuwar iyali?
Menene Afisawa 4:4–6 — 'jiki daya, ruhu daya, fata daya... Ubangiji daya, bangaskiya daya, baftisma daya, Allah Uba daya' — yake koyarwa game da tushen hadin kai na gaskiya?
Wane matakai na aiki don kiyaye salamar tunani ne Filibbiyawa 4:6–7 — 'kada ku damu... amma ku sa a san addu'arku ga Allah' — yake bayarwa?
Yaya bayanin Bulus na Yesu yana 'kwance kansa' (2:5–8) yake koyarwa abin da halin Kirista ya kamata ya kasance?
Menene maganar Bulus 'na koyi zama mai gamsuwa a kowane yanayi da nake ciki' (4:11) yake koyarwa game da gamsuwa a matsayin fasaha don habakawa?
Yaya yanayin farin ciki na Bulus a duk Filibbiyawa — wanda aka rubuta yayin da yake a kurkuku — ya nuna cewa farin ciki na gaskiya yana zuwa daga dangantakar mutum da Jehobah, ba daga yanayi ba?
Menene Filibbiyawa 1:21 — 'a gareni, rayuwa Kristi ce kuma mutuwa riba ce' — yake bayyana game da mahangar Bulus kan rayuwa, mutuwa, da fata na tashin matattu?
Yaya bayanin Bulus na Yesu a matsayin 'dan fari na dukan halitta' da 'dan fari daga matattu' (1:15–18) yake fayyace matsayin Yesu na musamman a gaban Jehobah?
Wace falsafa ta karya da 'al'adun dan adam' (2:8) ne Bulus ya yi gargadi wa Kolosiyawa game da su, kuma wace dauma ce ke kasancewa da hadarin da Shaidun Jehobah ke fuskanta a yau?
Yaya umurnin Bulus na 'bari salamar Kristi ta yi mulki a zukatanku' (3:15) da 'bari kalmar Kristi ta zauna a cikinku da yawa' (3:16) ke bayyana muhimmin abu na kalmar Allah a rayuwar ikilisiya?
Menene shawarar Bulus na dangantaka — maza/mata, yara/iyaye (3:18–4:1) — yake bayyana game da yin amfani da ka'idodin Kirista a rayuwar yau da kullum?
Yaya ka'idar 'duk abin da kuke yi, ku yi shi da dukan rai kamar ga Jehobah ba ga mutane ba' (3:23) ke canza yadda muka kusanto aiki na yau da kullum da nauyi?
Wane abubuwa musamman Bulus ya bayyana game da dawowar Kristi (4:13–18), kuma me ya sa wannan koyarwa take ba da ta'aziyya ga wadanda suka rasa kaunatattu a mutuwa?
Yaya bayanin Bulus na bangaskiya mai aiki ta mutanen Tasalonika — 'aikin bangaskiya, kwazon kauna, jurewa da fata ya zaburar' (1:3) — yake bayyana daidaitacciyar rayuwar Kirista ta dukan zuciya?
Menene umarnin Bulus na 'tsarkake jikkunanku cikin tsarki da girmamawa, ba a cikin sha'awar jiki ba' (4:4–5) yake koyarwa game da tsabta ta sha'awa?
Yaya shawarar Bulus 'kada ku kashe ruhu' (5:19) ke shafar halin mu game da jagoranci na ruhi da jagora daga Jehobah a yau?
Menene koyarwar Bulus game da 'ranar Jehobah tana zuwa daidai kamar barawo da dare' (5:2) yake koyarwa game da muhimmancin sa ido na ruhi da shiri?
Menene bayanin Bulus na 'mutumin mugunta' (2:3–12) yake taimaka mana mu gano, kuma yaya yake ba da gudummawa ga fahimtar mu game da ridda?
Yaya tabbatar da Bulus cewa Jehobah 'zai sa ku tabbatu kuma ya kiyaye ku daga mugu' (3:3) yake ba da karfi yayin gwaji?
Menene gyaran Bulus na wadanda suka daina aiki domin sun yi tunanin ranar Jehobah ya kusan zuwa (sura 3) yake koyarwa game da kiyaye tsari daidaitacce, mai aminci?
Yaya addu'ar Bulus cewa Jehobah zai 'ta'azantar da zukatanku kuma ya tabbatar da ku a kowane aiki nagari da magana nagari' (2:16–17) ke jagorantar yadda muke goyon bayan juna a ikilisiya?
Menene 2 Tasalonikawa 1:7–10 yake bayyana game da saukin da mutanen Jehobah za su samu lokacin da ya yi aiki, kuma yaya wannan ke tallafa jurewa?
Wace cancantar dattawa da bayin hidima (sura 3) ne Bulus ya zayyana, kuma menene wadannan suke koyarwa game da ma'aunin da Jehobah ya saita don jagorancin ikilisiya?
Yaya umurnin Bulus game da addu'a 'don sarakuna da dukan masu mulki' (2:1–2) yake nuna halin daidaitacce da Shaidun Jehobah suke da shi game da gwamnatocin dan adam?
Menene 1 Timoti 6:6–10 yake koyarwa game da hadarin 'kaunar kudi' da gamsuwar da take zuwa da bautar Allah?
Yaya umurnin Bulus ga Timoti na 'yi yaki na bangaskiya mai kyau' (6:12) ya shafi yake-yake na ruhi da kowane Shaidan Jehobah ke fuskanta?
Menene maganar 'akwai Allah daya, kuma matsakanci daya tsakanin Allah da mutane, mutum, Kristi Yesu' (2:5) yake koyarwa game da rawar musamman ta Yesu da kuma damar mu zuwa Jehobah?
Menene umurnin Bulus ga Timoti na 'yi wa'azin kalmar, ka tsaya kanta a lokuta masu kyau da masu wuya' (4:2) yake koyarwa game da juriya a aikin wa'azi?
Yaya bayanin Bulus na 'kwanaki na karshe' (3:1–5) yake taimaka wa Shaidun Jehobah su gane alamar lokutan da muke rayuwa?
Menene 2 Timoti 3:16–17 yake koyarwa game da numfashin Allah na Nassi da rawarsa wajen shirya bayin Jehobah 'gaba daya don kowane aiki nagari'?
Yaya misalin Bulus — 'na yi yaki mai kyau, na gudu zuwa karshe, na rike bangaskiya' (4:7) — ya yi abin koyi na halin da ya kamata mu kasance ga dukan rayuwarmu ta hidima?
Menene koyarwar Bulus game da 'sarrafa kalmar gaskiya daidai' (2:15) yake koyarwa game da nauyin wadanda ke koyar a ikilisiya?
Menene Titus 2:11–12 — alherin Jehobah 'yana koyar mana mu ki rashin tsoron Allah' — yake koyarwa game da yadda nazarin Nassi ke kera halayyarmu?
Yaya shawarar Bulus ga maza tsofaffi, mata tsofaffi, mata matasa, da maza matasa (2:2–8) ke nuna sha'awar Jehobah game da halaye masu tsoron Allah a kowane mataki na rayuwa?
Menene Titus 3:5 — 'an cece... ta wurin wankan da ya kawo mana rai da kuma sabuntawa ta ruhu mai tsarki' — yake koyarwa game da rawar ruhu mai tsarki a rayuwarmu ta ruhi?
Yaya umurnin Bulus ga Titus game da 'kin mai raba kai' (3:10) bayan gargadi biyu yake daidaita hakuri da bukatar kare salamar ikilisiya?
Menene jaddada a duk Titus game da dattawa kasancewa 'marasa zargi' yake koyarwa game da hadi tsakanin daraja ta kai da jagoranci mai inganci na ruhi?

Menene rokon Bulus ga Filemon ya karbi Onesimus ya dawo 'ba a matsayin bawa ba, sai dai... a matsayin dan'uwa' (a. 16) yake koyarwa game da yadda bangaskiya cikin Kristi ke canza dangantakar zamantakewa?
Yaya hanyar Bulus — yana roko bisa tushen kauna maimakon umartar (a. 8–9) — ya yi abin koyi na yadda batutuwan ikilisiya ya kamata a kula da su a kyakkyawar hanya?
Menene Filemon yake koyarwa game da ka'idar gafara da ba da farawa sabuwa ga wasu, daidai da misalin Jehobah?
Yaya sauya Onesimus daga bawa mai gudu zuwa 'mai amfani' (a. 11) mai hidima yake nuna ikon canza rayuwa na karbar bishara?
Menene wannan wasikar kai ta bayyana game da kulawar Bulus na zurfi ga mutane da kuma ingancin dangantaka a cikin ikilisiyar Kirista ta farko?
Yaya Ibraniyawa sura 1–2 ke kafa fifikon Yesu a kan mala'iku yayin da kuma jaddada cikakken dan adam, kuma me ya sa duka biyun suke da muhimmanci?
Menene Ibraniyawa 4:12 — 'kalmar Allah tana raye kuma tana aiki' — yake koyarwa game da yadda za a kusanci karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki na kai da kalmar Jehobah?
Yaya 'surar bangaskiya' (sura 11) take amfani da misalai daga Habila zuwa annabawa don kayyade bangaskiya a matsayin imani da aiki, kuma wane misali kuke ganin yana fi motsa zuciya?
Menene Ibraniyawa 12:1–2 — 'bari mu gudu da jurewa tseren da aka shimfida a gabanmu, muna duban Shugaba kuma Mai Cika Bangaskiyarmu' — yake koyarwa game da jurewa wahala?
Yaya nuna Ibraniyawa cewa hadayar Yesu ta cika kuma ta wuce dukan tsarin Lawiyawa yake taimaka bayyana dangantakar Nassosin Ibrananci da Nassosin Helenanci na Kirista?
Menene Yakubu 1:2–4 yake koyarwa game da kallon gwaji a matsayin damar girma na ruhi da habaka jurewa?
Yaya gargadin Yakubu game da 'bangaskiya ba tare da ayyuka ba' (2:14–26) yake fayyace cewa bangaskiya ta gaskiya ta dabi'a tana samar da aiki mai ganuwa?
Wace shawarwa musamman Yakubu yake bayarwa game da sarrafa harshe (sura 3), kuma me ya sa ya kira shi 'duniya ta rashin adalci' idan an yi amfani da shi ba daidai ba?
Yaya Yakubu 5:14–16 yake bayyana rawar dattawa wajen yin addu'a da kula da wadanda suke da rashin lafiya ko rauni na ruhi a ikilisiya?
Menene bayanin Yakubu na 'hikima daga sama' (3:17–18) — 'mai tsabta, mai salama, mai ma'ana, a shirye ta yi biyayya, cike da jinkai' — yake koyarwa game da irin hikimar da Jehobah ke kimar?
Yaya bayanin Bitrus na Kiristoci a matsayin 'baki da mazauna na dan lokaci' (2:11) yake kera halin mu ga tsarin duniya da amincin mu na farko?
Menene shawarar Bitrus na 'ku yi biyayya ga kowane halittar dan adam' (2:13–17) da iyakokinta yake koyarwa game da dangantakar daidaitacciyar Shaidun Jehobah da gwamnatocin dan adam?
Yaya umurnin Bitrus ga mata da maza (3:1–7) — gami da ka'idar 'ruhu mai shiru kuma mai laushi' — yake aiki a gidajen Kirista a yau?
Menene kiran Bitrus na 'koyaushe a shirye ku yi kariya' don fatarmu (3:15) yake koyarwa game da shirin ruhi don tattaunawa game da bangaskiyarmu?
Yaya bayanin Bitrus na shaidan a matsayin 'zaki mai ruri' yake nemi cinyewa (5:8) yake motsa Shaidun Jehobah su kiyaye sa idon ruhi?
Menene jerin halayen Bitrus na 'samar tare da bangaskiyarku' (1:5–7) — kyakkyawa, ilimi, kamewa, jurewa, bautar Allah, kaunar 'yan'uwa, kauna — yake koyarwa game da girma na ruhi?
Yaya Bitrus ke bayyana tabbacin ranar Jehobah da sammai sabbi da sabuwar duniya (3:10–13), kuma yaya wannan sanin ya kamata ya shafi halayenmu?
Menene gargadin Bitrus game da malamai na karya 'da sirri suna shigowa da darikoki masu barna' (2:1) yake koyarwa game da muhimmancin sa ido na koyarwa a ikilisiya?
Yaya 2 Bitrus 3:9 — 'Jehobah ba shi da jinkiri game da alkawarinsa... ba ya son a hallaka kowa amma yana son duka su zo ga tuba' — yake koyarwa game da hakurin Jehobah?
Menene karfafa Bitrus ta karshe na 'girma cikin alheri da sanin Ubangijinmu' (3:18) yake koyarwa game da yanayi mai dawwama na ci gaban ruhi?
Yaya Yohanna ke kayyade zumunci ta gaskiya da Jehobah — 'tafiya cikin haske' (1:5–7) — kuma menene wannan ke nufi a aiki ga halayenmu na yau da kullum?
Wane gwaje-gwaje uku Yohanna yake bayarwa don gano Kiristoci na gaskiya — biyayya, kauna ga 'yan'uwa, da imani cikin Yesu a matsayin Kristi — kuma yaya suke aiki tare?
Yaya maganar Yohanna 'Allah kauna ce' (4:8, 16) ke kafa tushen fahimtar dukan harkar Jehobah da mutane?
Menene Yohanna yake koyarwa game da 'duniya' — mai mulkinta, sha'awar jiki da idanu, da nuna alfahari na rayuwa (2:15–17) — kuma yaya wannan ya kamata ya shafi zabinmu?
Yaya 1 Yohanna 5:13 — 'na rubuta wadannan abubuwa gare ku don ku sani kuna da rai' — ke bayyana amincewar da Jehobah ke son bayinsa su kasance da ita game da rai madawwami?
Menene jaddadar Yohanna a kan 'tafiya cikin gaskiya' (aya ta 4) ke nufi, kuma me ya sa amincin koyarwa ba ya rabuwa daga kauna a koyarwar Yohanna?
Menene gargadin Yohanna na rashin maraba wadanda ke yada koyarwa ta karya cikin gidan (aya ta 10) yake koyarwa game da kare ikilisiya daga tasiri mai cutarwa?
Yaya Yohanna ke bayyana 'umarni da muka samu tun farkon' (aya ta 5) — kaunar juna — a matsayin muhimmi ga kasancewar Kirista?
Menene wannan dan gajeren wasikar yake koyarwa game da muhimmancin sa ido kan wadanda 'ba sa ci gaba a cikin koyarwar Kristi' (aya ta 9)?
Yaya sakon Yohanna mai daidaita — yana tabbatar da kauna da gaskiya yayin da kuma yana gargadi game da sadaukarwa — yake yin abin koyi don sadarwa cikin aminci?
Menene yabon Yohanna na Gayus don maraba masu mishan masu tafiya yake koyarwa game da muhimmancin bakunci wajen tallafa aikin wa'azi?
Yaya tsawatar Yohanna na Diyotrefas — wanda 'yana son matsayi na farko' kuma ya ki maraba 'yan'uwa — yake gargadi game da girman kai da nuna muhimmancin kai a ikilisiya?
Menene 'tafiya cikin gaskiya' (ayoyi 3–4) ke nufi a aiki, kuma me ya sa Yohanna ya ce wannan yana ba shi farin ciki fiye da kowane abu?
Yaya misalin Demetrius mai kyau (aya ta 12) — 'wanda dukan suka shaida masa, hatta gaskiya da kanta' — yake bayyana irin darajar da Shaidun Jehobah ya kamata su nemi gina?
Menene wannan dan gajeren wasikar yake koyarwa game da hanyoyin aiki da za mu iya tallafa wa wadanda 'suke aiki saboda sunan' (aya ta 7)?
Menene kiran gaggawa na Yahuda na 'yi yaki mai tsanani don bangaskiya' (aya ta 3) yake koyarwa game da nauyin kowane Kirista mai kai na kare koyarwa ta gaskiya?
Yaya Yahuda ke amfani da misalai na tarihi — Isra'ila a hamada, mala'iku da suka bar mazauninsu daidai, Saduma da Gomora — don yin gargadi game da sakamako na ridda?
Menene Yahuda yake koyarwa game da wadanda suka 'shigo a boye' (aya ta 4), kuma yaya Shaidun Jehobah za su iya gano da kare daga irin tasiri a yau?
Yaya bayanin Yahuda na 'gina kanku a kan bangaskiyarku mafi tsarki, kuna addu'a da ruhu mai tsarki' (aya ta 20) ke bayyana karfafa na ruhi da ake bukata don tsayayya koyarwa ta karya?
Menene yabon Yahuda na karshe (ayoyi 24–25) — 'Yanzu ga wanda zai iya kiyaye ku daga tuntube' — yake koyarwa game da dogara ga Jehobah don kariya ta ruhi?
Yaya wahayin Ru'ya ta Yohanna na Jehobah a kursiyinsa (sura 4) da Dan Rago yana karbar littafi (sura 5) ya kafa tushe na hakkin Jehobah na yin hukunci da aiki?
Menene wasiku bakwai zuwa ikilisiyoyi (sura 2–3) suke koyarwa game da musamman karfi da raunin da Jehobah yake lura a mutanensa?
Yaya wahayin babban taro (sura 7) da 144,000 suke bayyana kungiyoyi biyu na mutanen Jehobah wadanda za su sami ceto?
Menene 'Babila Babba' ke wakilta (sura 17–18), kuma menene kiran Jehobah 'ku fita daga cikinta, mutanena' yake nufi ga bayinsa a yau?
Yaya wahayin Ru'ya ta Yohanna na karshe — sabuwar Urushalima, cire mutuwa, da Jehobah yana zaune da mutane (sura 21–22) — yake tallafa fatar Shaidun Jehobah don aljanna?
